entries.title: Cat-Ear Hoodie Anime City Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical anime-style street fashion illustration of a young woman with pale skin and long silver-white hair standing in the middle of a busy modern Japanese city crossing, surrounded by softly blurred pedestrians and tall buildings covered in colorful billboards. She wears an oversized black zip-up hoodie with cat-ear hood, red piping, white drawstrings, patch emblems on the chest and sleeve, and bulky sleeves, a red graphic T-shirt with a simple white skull-like mascot face, and loose black cargo pants with a small red accent at the waistband. Her hood is up, forming sharp black cat ears, with a small ahoge strand of hair at the top and white hair falling around her shoulders; her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque pale beige square censor block. Pose her walking toward the viewer with a relaxed urban attitude, holding a black umbrella handle in one hand and a glossy black handbag in the other. Use a bright daytime Shibuya-like setting with crosswalk lines, glass towers, red and blue signage, atmospheric haze, depth of field, soft rim lighting, clean linework, smooth cel shading, fashionable youth-culture mood, and a polished GPT-image-2 anime illustration look.
entries.description: Generates a vertical anime streetwear portrait of a silver-haired character in a cat-ear hoodie walking through a busy Japanese city crossing.

entries.title: Rainy Sakura Schoolgirl Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical cinematic photorealistic portrait of a Japanese high school girl with long dark purple hair crouching in the middle of a rainy city street, viewed from an extremely low wide-angle perspective with one loafer and white ribbed sock large in the foreground and her reflection visible in the glossy puddled asphalt. She wears a beige blazer, white shirt, gray necktie, red plaid skirt, white knee socks, and brown penny loafers, holding a transparent clear umbrella above her head with delicate pink cherry blossom petals scattered across the canopy and floating through the rain. Her face is softly obscured by a smooth rectangular blur, while her posture remains gentle and intimate. In her other arm she cradles a small fluffy gray-and-white kitten against her chest. The background is a misty modern urban street with tall buildings dissolved into pale gray bokeh, falling rain streaks, oversized suspended water droplets, ripples in puddles, and scattered sakura petals on the wet ground. Use a dreamy spring-rain atmosphere, soft diffused overcast light, shallow depth of field, glossy reflections, realistic fabric texture, wet skin highlights, detailed umbrella ribs and raindrops, emotional quiet mood, high-end fashion editorial composition, ultra-detailed photorealism, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio.

entries.title: Aqua-Haired Anime Street Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vibrant vertical anime illustration of Mahilo, a stylish teenage girl standing in profile on a bright Japanese shopping street, viewed from mid-thigh up with a dynamic low-angle fashion-photo composition. She has extremely long flowing turquoise aqua hair streaming dramatically to the left in the wind, with glossy highlights, loose strands, and a few ahoge flyaways; her face is intentionally hidden by a soft-edged pale beige square censor block centered over the eyes, nose, and mouth. She wears an oversized shiny white track jacket with two bold cyan stripes running down each sleeve, ribbed cuffs and hem, a slightly wrinkled glossy fabric texture, and a high collar; pair it with tight black shiny short shorts. Add a black backpack with thin straps over both shoulders, visible side pockets, zipper pulls, and one yellow chick-shaped charm keychain hanging on the back. Pose her with one hand tucked into the jacket pocket, hips angled, torso turned slightly away from the viewer, conveying casual confidence. The background is a sunlit narrow urban street in Japan with tall buildings on both sides, strong perspective lines, blue sky glow, overhead wires, storefront signs, and shallow depth of field; include exactly six visible street-sign elements: one large red sign on the left, one blue vertical sign with the number 2 on the upper right, one red circular upward-chevron sign, one blue circular upward-arrow sign, one red-and-white no-entry sign on the left, and one small green diamond sign on the right. Use saturated cyan-and-white color grading, crisp anime linework, glossy cel shading, high contrast sunlight, sparkling dust particles, motion in the hair, and a polished gpt-image-2 anime key visual style. Aspect ratio 9:16, clean composition, no extra characters, no text overlays besides blurred environmental signage.

entries.title: Ordinary Evening Street Snapshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, realistic street photo of a young woman in her late teens or early twenties standing outdoors in an upscale urban shopping district at blue hour, framed from mid-thigh to head in a vertical smartphone composition. She has dark brown to black hair styled in low twin ponytails with soft loose strands, and wears a simple, ordinary campus-style outfit: a white button-up shirt under an oversized dark navy cardigan with visible front buttons, paired with a dark pleated skirt. She carries 1 off-white canvas tote bag over her shoulder, holds 1 takeaway coffee cup with a brown sleeve in one hand, and 1 silver smartphone in the other hand. The mood is natural and unglamorous, like an everyday snapshot, with soft ambient evening light, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric textures, and a slightly cool color tone. The background shows softly blurred storefront windows glowing warm yellow on the left, a pedestrian street paved with stone, 4 distant people walking in the background, and a visible illuminated building sign reading T-SITE. Make the subject look casually stylish but very normal and believable, with a documentary candid-photo feel, subtle bokeh, and no exaggerated fashion pose.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic candid portrait of a casually dressed young woman holding coffee and a phone in a softly lit city shopping street, useful for lifestyle photography and everyday fashion scenes.

entries.title: Dreamy 16-Photo Couple Walk Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A 4x4 collage of 16 candid smartphone snapshots arranged in a tight square grid with thin white dividers, styled like spontaneous couple selfies taken during an evening walk in a lush residential neighborhood. The images have a soft dreamy look with slight motion blur, shallow focus, mild fisheye or wide-angle phone-lens distortion, and a nostalgic green-tinted film aesthetic. The recurring subjects are a cute young woman and a taller young man, but both faces are intentionally obscured by large soft-edged rectangular blur blocks centered over their faces in every frame. The woman has long wavy blonde hair in twin ponytails tied with oversized mint-green ribbon bows, fair skin, and wears a light sage-green spaghetti-strap sundress with a gathered bodice. The man has short dark hair and wears a loose dark charcoal T-shirt. The collage should feel playful, intimate, and accidental, as if captured while walking and joking around outdoors. Show exactly 16 different shots: 1) close selfie of the pair shoulder-to-shoulder, 2) slightly higher-angle selfie with greenery behind them, 3) very close blurry selfie with the man leaning in from the left, 4) the woman alone from a high angle near flowerbeds and hedges, 5) side selfie with the woman making a peace sign, 6) the woman reaching one hand toward the camera while standing on a narrow garden path, 7) selfie of both together with the woman flashing a peace sign, 8) tilted close-up of the pair with strong motion blur, 9) close-up portrait of the woman alone making a peace sign, 10) selfie of the couple while walking along a roadside, 11) rear view of the woman alone from behind, showing the back of her dress and twin ponytails, 12) selfie of both with the woman making a peace sign beside the man, 13) extreme close crop with the woman's hair and bow prominent, 14) full-body rear shot of the couple walking away down a quiet street, 15) close blurry selfie dominated by the face-obscuring blocks, 16) another close selfie of both side-by-side. Background details across the collage should include dense green hedges, garden flowers, a narrow lane, roadside grass, utility poles, and a quiet suburban street. Use natural ambient outdoor light, muted highlights, soft contrast, and a candid social-media photo dump vibe.
entries.description: This prompt generates a nostalgic grid collage of candid blurred-face couple snapshots, ideal for social-media-style lifestyle imagery or album-cover mood boards.

entries.title: Golden Hour Bus Stop Candid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, ultra-realistic street photo of a young East Asian woman standing at a city bus stop during golden hour, viewed from slightly behind other waiting passengers so the composition feels naturally obstructed and documentary-like. She stands near the center-right of the frame, looking down at a smartphone in her hands, with long straight dark brown to black hair glowing with warm backlight from the low sun behind her. She wears a white T-shirt, an oversized pale blue button-up shirt left open, and loose cream or off-white high-waisted pants or a long skirt, with a canvas tote bag over one shoulder. Her posture is relaxed and absorbed in her phone. The scene includes exactly 2 blurred foreground figures framing her: 1 large out-of-focus figure with long hair on the left edge and 1 dark-shirted shoulder and back on the right edge. Behind her is a glass bus shelter panel reflecting trees and sunlight, and on the far right is a vertical bus route board showing exactly 4 route numbers: 622, 648, 686, and 740, with Chinese transit timetable styling. The lighting is warm, soft, and strongly backlit, creating rim light around her hair and a sun-drenched late-afternoon atmosphere. Use a smartphone photo aesthetic, shallow depth of field, natural color, realistic skin and fabric texture, urban everyday life in China, portrait orientation, subtle lens flare, and an unposed slice-of-life mood.

entries.title: Urban Graffiti Hoodie Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A moody full-body fashion portrait of a young woman standing in a narrow urban alley or tunnel covered in dense colorful graffiti, photographed at night with dramatic low-key lighting and flash-lit realism. She is leaning casually against the wall with 1 hand touching a large pair of over-ear black headphones and 1 hand tucked into the front pocket of an oversized mustard yellow hoodie. The hoodie is long enough to read almost like a hoodie dress and has a simple black smiley-face graphic centered on the chest with white drawstrings. She wears a black backpack with 2 visible shoulder straps, white crew socks, and chunky black-and-white low-top sneakers. Her legs are bare, and her pose is relaxed with one knee slightly bent and one foot set forward. Her hair is shoulder-length, slightly messy, and dark blonde. Compose the shot vertically from head to shoes, with the subject centered slightly left of frame. The background is a gritty painted wall dominated by turquoise blue, yellow, pink, and black spray paint, with drips, tags, and abstract cartoon-like graffiti shapes creating a raw street-art atmosphere. The floor is dark, worn, and reflective with paint splatters. Use high contrast, deep shadows, realistic skin and fabric texture, editorial streetwear photography style, underground urban vibe, sharp focus on clothing and body, subdued facial detail, and a cinematic dark nightlife mood.

The setting is a narrow market alley: charcoal smoke rising from the grill, handwritten Thai-script price tags taped to the stall edge, a neon beer sign partially visible in the far background. Lighting comes from the amber charcoal grill below her face mixing with a cool fluorescent tube above the stall, creating dual-toned shadows along her neck and jaw. Composition: medium close-up, eye-level, subject occupies left two-thirds of frame, blurred vendor and food stall crowd filling right side. Color palette: warm amber, deep shadow zones, subtle cool neon accent in distance, muted earthy market tones. Render with photographic realism: subtle film grain throughout, avoid over-smoothed CG textures, preserve natural imperfections. Skin should show subsurface scattering and micro-texture, not digital smoothing. Hair: subtle natural imperfection, not geometric perfection. Photorealistic rendering, no watermark.

entries.title: Mumbai Rainy Street Photography
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic street photography of a young man standing alone on a rainy urban sidewalk during golden hour sunset in Mumbai, India. He is leaning casually against a black metal roadside railing while looking down at his smartphone, wearing an oversized black hoodie, loose dark blue cargo jeans, and clean white sneakers. Messy textured black hair moving slightly in the wind. Moody introspective vibe.

Wide-angle composition with dramatic depth and strong leading lines from the wet pavement and railings. Reflective rain-soaked street surface glowing with warm sunset light. Vintage street lamps lining the sidewalk. Historic Gothic architecture inspired by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus visible on the right side, detailed stone textures and clock tower. Modern skyscrapers fading into atmospheric haze in the distant background, creating a blend of old and new Mumbai cityscape.

Soft cinematic clouds filling the sky with warm orange, peach, and golden tones. A flying bird silhouette crossing the sky. Light traffic with black-and-yellow taxis and blurred cars moving through the street. Realistic puddle reflections, subtle motion blur, volumetric lighting, atmospheric perspective, ultra-detailed textures, natural shadows, realistic skin tones.

Shot on Sony A7R IV, 35mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, HDR photography, photorealistic, cinematic color grading, warm highlights with cool shadows, highly detailed urban realism, editorial photography style, 8K ultra resolution.

entries.title: Monochromatic High-Fashion Editorial with Python
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial portrait of a beautiful young woman standing confidently in a monochromatic red urban environment, wearing modern luxury white streetwear fashion. Oversized white bomber jacket, fitted white crop top, layered white cargo pants with metallic chains, white tactical sneakers, silver jewelry, subtle glossy makeup, soft matte skin texture, long voluminous ash-brown wavy hair with wispy bangs flowing naturally in the wind. A massive realistic albino python emerges behind and around her body, partially concealed within thick swirling white smoke and atmospheric fog. The snake appears lifelike with detailed scales, realistic muscle tension, natural reflections, visible texture, sharp eyes, and subtle movement. The environment is almost entirely white - white architecture, white smoke, white clothing, white textures, white lighting - creating a clean monochromatic aesthetic. Large distressed black "1998" typography dominates the background in bold industrial font, the only dark element in the entire composition. Strong contrast between the black numbers and the all-white scene. entries.title: Ascetic Monk Cleaning Neon Tokyo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic, photorealistic night scene in a dense Japanese entertainment district after rain, with wet asphalt reflecting neon signs in pink, red, blue, and yellow. In the left foreground, show one mysterious wandering ascetic monk or hermit, seen from behind, wearing a heavy tattered patterned golden-brown robe, straw sandals, a rope belt, and a tall bundled straw hat or woven pilgrim headpiece that hides the face. The monk is doing street cleanup before entering the nightlife district: he holds one long metal litter picker in the left hand, grasping one piece of red trash near an open cardboard box, and carries one large transparent plastic garbage bag in the right hand filled with collected litter. Include exactly four prominent cleanup-related foreground objects: one cardboard box with Japanese writing, one blue plastic crate, one posted warning sign on a fence, and scattered small trash on the pavement. The background is a deep urban canyon of buildings with many glowing vertical Japanese signs, pachinko and karaoke-style storefronts, pedestrians with umbrellas and silhouettes, car headlights, traffic lights, and a large central billboard with a stylized anime girl and the number 109. Mood: contemplative, surreal, and slightly humorous, as if a saintly hermit is accumulating virtue before gambling. Use Kabukicho-like Tokyo nightlife street, wandering ascetic monk, tattered golden-brown, rainy night after a storm, and pachinko, karaoke, tax-free shops, and anime billboards. Ultra-detailed realistic textures, moody low-key lighting, reflective puddles, wide-angle street photography composition, 16:9 aspect ratio, gritty cinematic color grading, no clean fantasy glow, no cartoon style.

entries.prompt: Create a gritty photorealistic street portrait of an elderly skater man with curly gray hair crouching in a concrete skatepark under an overpass, framed from head to shoes in a vertical 4:5 composition. His face is covered by a centered opaque rectangular privacy block in muted brown, while gray curls remain visible around the top and sides. He wears layered black urban skatewear: a black windbreaker jacket over a gray hoodie, a dark T-shirt with a small white graphic, loose black cargo pants, a wristwatch, rings, and black-and-white Vans Old Skool sneakers with white laces. He squats low on a concrete ledge with one knee raised, relaxed hands hanging forward, and one hand resting near a worn old skateboard standing upright beside him. entries.title: Fisheye Shibuya Yokai Selfie
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dynamic ultra-wide fisheye action selfie photo at Shibuya Crossing, Tokyo on a bright sunny day, shot from a low front-facing camera with strong circular lens vignetting and exaggerated perspective. In the foreground, show one fashionable teenage schoolgirl with long wavy pastel-blonde hair, wearing a Japanese school uniform with a gray cardigan, white shirt, dark bow tie, blue plaid skirt, knee socks, black loafers, and a small brown shoulder bag. Her face is intentionally covered by a flat square privacy blur/censor block, while her nearest hand reaches dramatically toward the camera, huge from perspective distortion, with glossy manicured nails; her other arm stretches outward as if posing mid-crosswalk. Behind her, place one enormous floating fantasy yokai/kaiju creature towering above the city buildings: a cute but strange green-and-brown owl-deer-dragon spirit with antlers, crescent horn shapes, leaf-feather body patterns, long ribbon-like tendrils, glowing lime outlines, and a calm smiling face. Surround the scene with dense pedestrian traffic, zebra crossing stripes, tall commercial buildings, colorful Japanese signage, glass façades, realistic street shadows, and midday urban energy. Blend photorealistic street photography with a flat 2D illustrated monster composited convincingly into the sky, using crisp daylight, high detail, motion-filled crowds, playful surreal scale contrast, and a viral social-media snapshot feeling. The creature's palette should emphasize neon lime green, and the overall mood should feel whimsical, chaotic, and cinematic.
entries.description: Generates a surreal fisheye Tokyo street selfie with a schoolgirl foreground pose and a giant illustrated yokai towering over Shibuya Crossing.

entries.title: Gothic Maid Superhero Landing
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime illustration of Noel, a blonde gothic-lolita maid heroine performing a superhero landing in the middle of a ruined city street. She is crouched low with one fist smashed into cracked pavement, one knee forward, the other leg bent back, body leaning toward the viewer in a powerful dynamic perspective. Her face is deliberately obscured by a centered opaque tan square censor block, while her long curly golden blonde hair explodes upward and outward from the impact, decorated with a frilly white maid headpiece. She wears an elaborate black, pale pink, white, and gold frilled maid dress with layered ruffles, puffed sleeves, gold trim, a black bodice, pink-and-white apron details, white thigh-high stockings, glossy black Mary Jane shoes, and white cuffs with gold buttons. The environment is a cinematic disaster scene: tall shattered buildings forming a narrow urban canyon, broken stone slabs, dust clouds, debris and chunks of asphalt suspended in the air, impact cracks radiating from her fist, and a thin vertical blue-white energy beam descending from the sky behind her head. Use extreme low-angle perspective, intense motion, wind-swept fabric, flying rubble, volumetric sunlight breaking through smoke, high-detail anime rendering, sharp linework, glossy highlights, ornate costume details, dramatic backlighting, and a sense of explosive impact. Aspect ratio 3:4, full-body composition, no text.
entries.description: Generates a cinematic anime gothic-lolita maid character crashing into a ruined city street in a superhero landing pose.

entries.title: Rainy Cat-Ear Girl with Kitten
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical cinematic ultra-realistic rainy street portrait of a young woman with long wet dark brown hair crouching low on a reflective wet alley pavement, shot from an extreme low wide-angle perspective so one chunky purple-and-lavender sneaker dominates the foreground and the other shoe is behind her. She wears an oversized distressed blue zip hoodie with torn shoulder and sleeve holes, black socks, and bulky futuristic headphones topped with two glowing blue-black cat-ear attachments. Her face is intentionally hidden by a soft square blur censor centered over the face. She holds one transparent umbrella with visible black ribs and a white handle, covered in raindrops, while one small fluffy cream and gray kitten peeks out from the open hoodie at her chest. The scene contains exactly one woman, one kitten, one umbrella, one pair of headphones with two cat ears, and one pair of purple sneakers. Heavy rain falls through a moody urban alley with tall blurred buildings, puddle reflections, scattered pale pink cherry blossom petals on the ground, and large out-of-focus floating water droplets near the lens. Use a cool blue-purple color grade, glossy wet skin and fabric textures, shallow depth of field, dramatic bokeh, high detail, emotional rainy atmosphere, fashion editorial realism, 9:16 composition, no text.

entries.title: Catgirl Hardbass Alley Dancers
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic urban night scene in a narrow wet brick alley after rain, with exactly two young anime-inspired cat-eared female street dancers as the main subjects, both faces obscured by soft square blur blocks. The right dancer wears a black zip-up tracksuit with white triple side stripes, black chunky shoes, a white paw-print emblem on the chest, white cat ears, and extremely long flowing silver-white hair with black floral hair ornaments; she mirrors the same low squat dance pose with one leg extended forward, one arm raised in a hand sign, and the other arm bent across her face. Include exactly five blurred background onlookers in dark streetwear: one standing in the center distance, one crouching behind the dancers, one small figure between them, and two figures on the far right. Place a dark old sedan on the left with bright headlights and a visible Russian-style license plate, beside graffiti reading HARD BASS and CYKA with a simple cat doodle. The alley should have black brick walls, metal fire escapes, overhead industrial lamps, misty backlight, puddles, glossy reflections, dramatic rim lighting, shallow depth of field, motion blur in the kicking shoes and flying hair, high-contrast cyberpunk street photography, ultra-detailed fabric folds, wet asphalt texture, and a low wide-angle camera viewpoint at ground level. entries.title: Neon Midnight Anime Streetwear Girl
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vibrant anime-style full-body illustration of a fashionable young woman on a midnight stroll through a futuristic neon city, centered in the frame and floating or stepping midair with one knee bent and one boot extended downward. She has very long flowing black hair with violet and hot-pink ombré ends, glossy highlights, and wind-swept strands streaming to the right; her face is intentionally soft-blurred and featureless like a privacy blur. Dress her in a cropped white sleeveless button shirt, loose black bomber jacket slipping off the shoulders with pink lace-up details on one sleeve, black cargo jogger pants with pockets, straps, a belt, silver chain accessories, a purple thigh strap, white slouch socks, and chunky black lace-up boots. Add punk streetwear jewelry: rings, bracelets, ear piercings, and small metal accents. The background is a deep purple night skyline with scattered glowing particles like snow or city sparks, soft bokeh lights, and five prominent neon sign elements: one tall rounded pink Japanese-style sign on the left, one vertical pink sign with Japanese-style characters near the lower center, one tall pink sign behind her on the right, one cyan vertical sign reading GUNAD, and one low foreground building sign made of bright cyan and pink horizontal bars. Use saturated magenta, violet, cyan, and electric blue lighting, strong rim light on the hair and jacket, clean cel-shaded anime rendering, crisp line art, luminous gradients, cinematic depth of field, and a dynamic urban night atmosphere. Overall mood: cool, dreamy, rebellious midnight fashion.

entries.prompt: Create a cinematic, ultra-detailed single-scene image of a cute orange tabby cat riding a yellow vintage Vespa-style scooter through a rainy Japanese city street. entries.title: Tokyo Lollipop Street Sketch
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cute, rough hand-drawn digital illustration in a playful sketchbook style, as if drawn with a thick black marker and quickly colored with flat pastel fills and scratchy white crayon highlights. The scene is a busy Tokyo street crossing from a first-person tourist viewpoint, with a blue-sleeved arm extending from the bottom foreground holding up a large round pink daruma-like lollipop or candy mask. The candy has a dramatic daruma face with blank white eyes, heavy black eyebrows and cheeks, orange shading, a red moustache-like mouth, blue spots, and blue handwritten letters reading TOKYO across the lower face. Center the composition around the candy, making it oversized and close to the camera. Behind it, show crowds of pedestrians from the back and side, including exactly 7 prominent visible people: a gray-hoodie man on the left, a black-haired person in a tan coat near left center, a partial person in dark blue at far left bottom, a small distant person in pale pink pants under the candy, a long-black-haired woman in a blue jacket and black skirt on the right, a partial pink-shirt person at far right, and a cropped person displayed on a vertical screen in the upper right. Set the background in a whimsical Shibuya-style urban cityscape under a bright blue sky with tiny white clouds, tall gray buildings, a traffic light and streetlight pole on the left, overhead wires, a red construction crane in the distance, and storefront billboards. Include exactly 4 readable text elements: a lavender sign on the central cylindrical building reading aero, large pink bubble title text floating in the sky reading TOKYO LOLLIPOP, a yellow-and-blue billboard on the left reading tKEA, and the blue writing on the candy reading TOKYO. Use intentionally imperfect perspective, wobbly outlines, naive proportions, dense city details, a cheerful tourist snapshot mood, and a square composition.

entries.title: Cute Hand-Drawn Korean Street Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a charming hand-drawn urban snapshot in a loose naive marker-and-crayon illustration style, like a casual travel diary sketch with thick black outlines, imperfect perspective, scribbly coloring, and a white paper background. Show a young woman standing in the foreground on a busy Korean shopping street, centered from thighs up, her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She wears a light gray patterned bucket hat, long dark braids, a black sleeveless strappy dress, a thin necklace, and carries a brown shoulder strap on one side while holding a black tote bag on the other; the tote has a white shell-like emblem and the word HONDA. Her pose is relaxed, one arm bent across her waist, with a fashion-street-photo feeling. Surround her with rectangular wooden planter boxes overflowing with dense bright green scribbled foliage and many small pink flowers, plus a tall brown wooden frame structure rising behind her. In the background, draw a lively commercial street with simplified stick-figure pedestrians and many overhead black utility wires crossing diagonally between poles. Use a bright but sketchy palette with brown buildings and posts, blue awnings and window areas, red and yellow shop signs, black wires, and vivid green-and-pink planters. Keep the composition vertical, playful, cute, and slightly messy, as if drawn quickly from a phone photo in a city neighborhood.

entries.title: Rainy After-School Umbrella Friends
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a polished anime-style illustration of two Japanese high school girls walking home together in the rain on a wet suburban street after school. They stand close under one large transparent plastic umbrella covered with raindrops, the umbrella canopy dominating the upper half of the composition with visible metal ribs and a black central shaft. The scene is vertical, waist-to-thigh framing, soft cinematic backlight, reflective puddles on the pavement, misty rain, power poles receding into the distance, metal guardrails along the sidewalk, residential houses and greenery at the sides, and purple hydrangeas blooming on the right. The left girl is shorter, with short chestnut-brown bob hair, a large red bow hair accessory on the side, a navy school blazer with gold buttons, white button-up shirt, red plaid ribbon bow tie, dark pleated plaid skirt, and a large navy school bag over her shoulder with a small cute plush keychain. She holds a backpack strap with one hand and lightly touches or holds the umbrella shaft area with the other, looking shy and close to her friend. The right girl is taller, with long lavender-purple hair, a blue flower hair clip near her ear, a navy school blazer with gold buttons, white button-up shirt, blue plaid ribbon bow tie, dark pleated plaid skirt, and a large navy school bag on her shoulder. She holds the umbrella handle firmly at the center, standing protectively beside the shorter girl. Both girls have their faces intentionally covered by smooth soft-edged rectangular blur blocks in muted skin-tone colors, hiding all facial features. Emphasize detailed wet fabric, glossy rain highlights, delicate hair strands damp from the weather, realistic umbrella transparency, sparkling water droplets, and a tender quiet mood of rainy after-school friendship. Use high-detail anime rendering, natural proportions, soft depth of field, cool blue-gray rainy palette with warm skin tones, and no visible text.

entries.title: Japanese Girl Urban Night Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A sweet-cool Japanese girl with an alluring, soft-sensual look

Scene: A convenience store entrance at night, with glass doors, bright refrigerator lighting, and slightly wet streets reflecting ambient light. The environment is quiet, carrying a subtle sense of urban solitude. Cool white store lighting mixes with warmer street lights, creating a soft contrast.

Outfit: A cropped top paired with loose-fit jeans or low-rise cargo pants, layered with a lightweight jacket or bomber. The styling feels clean and effortless, balancing sweetness with a subtle edge. The color palette leans toward white, gray, black, and light blue.

Makeup & styling: Lightweight, translucent base makeup with a natural glow. Slightly cool-toned blush, soft eye makeup with a subtly emphasized outer corner, fine eyeliner, and naturally defined lashes. Lips are in a glossy rose or natural pink tone. Hair is worn down or loosely tied, with a few soft strands framing the face.

Pose: Standing near the store entrance or leaning lightly against the glass. One hand holding a drink or a small convenience store bag, the other resting naturally at her side. Body slightly angled, legs casually crossed or offset for a relaxed stance.

Expression: Looking toward the camera with a faint, almost teasing smile. A slightly indifferent, effortless gaze-soft yet distant, carrying a subtle sense of cool detachment.

Style: Low contrast, shot on a Nikon DSLR. Nighttime ambient lighting with slight noise, giving a natural, candid, straight-out-of-camera feel.

Details: Realistic skin texture, gentle highlights from store lighting on the face. Background includes softly blurred signage, streetlights, and glass reflections. Hair slightly tousled, adding a lived-in, natural feel.

Mood: Quiet, urban, slightly distant yet intimate. A mix of everyday realism and subtle ambiguity, with a calm late-night atmosphere.

Camera: Medium shot or medium close-up, waist-up framing, slight handheld feel, shallow depth of field, documentary-style street photography.

Aspect ratio: 2:3

entries.title: Contrast Street Art Mural
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-detailed wide street art mural painted on a rough, weathered concrete city wall with a dramatic split composition. On the left side, a vibrant tropical beach scene in warm pastel tones features a young man (same face as reference) relaxing on a beach chair, casually sipping from a fresh coconut under a glowing sunset sky, surrounded by palm trees and gentle ocean waves. The mood is calm and carefree, enhanced with playful tropical emojis and the caption 'healing' integrated into the mural. On the right side, a dark, cluttered workspace in cold bluish-gray tones shows the same young man under stress, sitting at a messy desk filled with scattered papers, crumpled notes, a coffee mug, and dim lighting. A glowing laptop screen prominently displays 'DEADLINE 23:59,' casting harsh light on his tired face, creating a late-night, high-pressure atmosphere. In the center, bold graffiti-style text reads 'OTHERS ARE HEALING' and 'I AM ON A DEADLINE' in dripping paint typography with strong contrast and layered spray textures. Beneath the text, include a stylized dragon logo with the tag 'JOHNN' in graffiti signature style. Cinematic lighting, gritty textures, hyper-realistic mural finish, strong emotional contrast between relaxation and stress, urban street art aesthetic, 8K ultra-detailed resolution.

entries.title: Low-Angle Urban Street Photography
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-realistic low-angle street photography of a young man standing confidently in the middle of a modern city, surrounded by tall symmetrical high-rise apartment buildings forming a geometric frame around the sky. Shot from ground level looking upward (worm's-eye view), creating a powerful and dominant perspective.

The subject is a stylish young man with short curly hair and light facial hair, wearing yellow-tinted rectangular sunglasses, a plain black oversized t-shirt, beige cargo pants with subtle camo patches, and carrying a transparent water bottle in one hand. Black headphones rest around his neck, and a backpack strap is visible on his shoulders.

Expression calm and slightly serious, looking directly into the camera.

Background: bright blue sky with scattered soft clouds, buildings converging inward creating strong leading lines and symmetry. Urban residential towers with repeating windows and light concrete tones.

Lighting: natural daylight, crisp shadows, high contrast, sharp details, HDR look.

Composition: centered subject, vertical framing, strong perspective distortion from wide-angle lens (24mm or wider), cinematic depth.

Style: fashion editorial meets urban realism, ultra-detailed, 8k, sharp focus, realistic skin texture, high dynamic range.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished anime-style illustration of a cute young woman sitting alone at a sunlit cafe table by a large window, framed from about thigh-up in a slightly front-facing seated pose. She wears a frilly white summer dress with small black polka dots, short puff sleeves, a fitted bodice, a large bow at the chest, and layered ruffles around the skirt. entries.prompt: A candid smartphone photo of a young East Asian woman sitting at a small table inside a casual Taiwanese breakfast shop, medium shot in vertical 9:16 composition. She has shoulder-length straight dark brown to black hair with a side part and is wearing a fitted ribbed camisole in light gray, high-waisted light blue denim shorts, and a loose sheer white cardigan slipping off both shoulders. In the background, show the open storefront interior of a traditional breakfast stall with stainless steel counters, a glass warming display, condiment bottles, 1 worker behind the counter, 1 wall fan, and overhead menu boards with red and blue Chinese characters and prices. Also include a glass door on the left with Chinese signage and hours posted. entries.title: Atmospheric Tea Alley Street Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic narrow old alley tea-house scene in a dense East Asian neighborhood, shot at eye level with a slightly telephoto street-photography composition. The lane is cramped, damp, and richly layered with lived-in details: weathered storefronts, aged concrete and brick walls, tangled overhead wires, metal awnings, exposed pipes, hanging signs, and lush green vines and tree branches spilling in from above and along both sides. In the left foreground, place a rustic wooden table set for tea with exactly 1 metal kettle, 1 teapot, 1 tray of small blue-and-white porcelain teacups and small vessels, plus a few extra cups nearby; surround it with potted plants and stacked containers. Above and behind the table, hang exactly 3 illuminated vertical lantern-style signs with black Chinese calligraphy on warm cream paper, the largest reading 茶一味 and the others styled similarly, plus several darker wooden signboards with gold or light lettering. In the center of the alley, show white steam rising dramatically from a pot or food stall, partially obscuring stools and the passageway. On the right side, line up exactly 4 bicycles parked close together beside crates, baskets, and a black trash bin. Deeper in the alley, include exactly 4 visible people sitting or standing casually near tiny tables and stools, adding scale without dominating the image. The stone pavement should look wet and reflective, suggesting recent rain or humid weather. Lighting is soft natural daylight filtering from the bright opening at the far end of the alley, mixed with warm lantern glow, creating a moody cinematic contrast. Emphasize texture, authenticity, atmospheric depth, subtle haze, documentary realism, and a cozy hidden-gem tea-street feeling in an old Chinese lane.
entries.description: This prompt generates a richly detailed photorealistic hidden tea-lane alley scene, ideal for cinematic street photography, travel visuals, or mood-driven editorial art.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Rainy Street Robot Repair
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic cyberpunk street scene at night in heavy rain, ultra-detailed and photorealistic. In the foreground, a young East Asian woman mechanic with messy dark hair tied in a loose bun sits at a wet metal worktable, leaning forward with intense concentration as she repairs a small spherical quadruped robot. Her face is obscured by a centered square censor blur. She wears a transparent plastic rain poncho over dark clothing, the glossy folds catching neon reflections. In one hand she holds a precision screwdriver and with the other she adjusts exposed wiring and circuitry inside the robot's open shell. The robot is compact and worn, about the size of a small dog, with a white and gray rounded body, a blue camera-like lens for one eye, visible internal electronics, scratches, grime, and four articulated mechanical legs planted on the table. Scatter the tabletop with exact repair clutter: 2 screwdrivers, 2 batteries, 1 circuit board, 1 small camera or lens module, loose screws, wires, and a half-filled glass of amber liquid. Surround them with a dense neon-lit East Asian alley market full of rain-slick pavement, steam from food stalls, and pedestrians carrying umbrellas. Include at least 8 visible illuminated signs layered into the background, including a large red sign reading 修理, an orange sign reading "OPEN", a bright sign reading "24H", a vertical sign reading "ホテル", and additional mixed Chinese, Japanese, and Korean-style shop signs. Show several background figures in dark rainwear and translucent ponchos, some faces softly blurred by depth of field. Use moody blue-and-orange lighting, glossy reflections, mist, volumetric rain, shallow depth of field, dramatic bokeh, anamorphic highlights, high texture detail, gritty realism, and the feeling of a lone street technician fixing advanced hardware in a bustling futuristic city.
entries.description: This prompt generates a cinematic photorealistic cyberpunk scene of a rain-soaked street mechanic repairing a quadruped robot, ideal for sci-fi concept art and atmospheric city visuals.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy anime-style illustration of a fashionable young woman floating through the famous Shibuya Scramble Crossing in Tokyo on a bright spring day, with a soft pastel palette, glowing light, and whimsical urban fantasy mood. She is centered full-body, hovering slightly above the crosswalk while standing on a giant iridescent soap bubble. She has very long flowing dark indigo-black hair with a slight violet sheen, a pink floral headband with ribbons, and a sweet elegant outfit: a dusty pink knee-length dress with puffed long sleeves, layered ruffles, ribbon lacing at the chest, sakura flower embroidery near the hem, and a tan belt at the waist. Her expression should feel gentle and dreamy, her pose graceful and balanced, with one hand raised and pointing upward. Around her are many transparent rainbow soap bubbles of different sizes, about 16 visible bubbles total, drifting through the air. One large bubble near her raised hand contains a modern smartphone with a cherry blossom wallpaper. One medium bubble at lower left contains an open slim laptop angled toward the viewer. One large teardrop-shaped bubble hanging from her other hand contains 3 shopping items: a paper shopping bag printed with "SHIBUYA 109", a second pastel shopping bag, and a pink bunny-shaped pouch or plush accessory. One medium bubble on the lower right contains a silver compact camera. The setting is a lively, recognizable Shibuya streetscape with the cylindrical SHIBUYA 109 building in the center background and multiple Japanese commercial billboards and signs surrounding the crossing, including visible signage such as "DHC," "H&M," "DMM TV," and colorful vertical Japanese signs. Include pedestrians in the distance, crosswalk stripes, city poles, and realistic urban depth, but keep the girl as the clear focal point. The atmosphere should feel airy, magical, glossy, and slightly nostalgic, combining detailed city realism with highly polished anime character art, soft bloom lighting, shimmering reflections, translucent materials, and delicate springtime romance.

entries.title: Chinese Schoolchildren at Corner Shop
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid, photorealistic street documentary photo of three primary school children buying snacks at a small old-fashioned neighborhood convenience shop in China, shot in soft natural daylight. The scene is framed straight-on at storefront level, with a slightly compressed everyday snapshot feel, realistic textures, and subtle depth. On the left, one schoolgirl stands in profile wearing a light pink zip-up jacket, dark jeans, and a red scarf, her black hair tied in a ponytail with a white headband, looking down at coins or a small item in her hands. In the center, one schoolboy stands with his back to the camera in a bright blue school tracksuit and a navy-and-red backpack featuring a Mickey Mouse graphic, leaning slightly toward the counter. On the right, one younger schoolgirl with two low pigtails tied with pale pink hair ties leans against a large chest freezer, wearing a white long-sleeve top and blue athletic pants, with a pink backpack resting beside her. Behind the counter, inside the dim shop interior, one shopkeeper in a pink top with a cartoon character print stands partially obscured in shadow. The counter is cluttered with packaged snacks, clear plastic bags of candy, colorful biscuit boxes, jars, and small goods; the shelves behind are densely packed with drinks and snacks. A bunch of multicolored balloons hangs near the upper center of the shop entrance. The chest freezer in the foreground is white with a green lid trim and green Chinese branding on the side. The storefront is worn and modest, with peeling beige walls, a posted calendar or notice sheet on the left wall, metal-framed windows, and an open service window. Include authentic Chinese neighborhood shop details, natural messiness, believable lighting, muted urban colors, and an unposed slice-of-life atmosphere. Faces should be softly obscured or turned away, emphasizing realism and privacy rather than portrait detail.

entries.title: Lavender Catgirl at Sunset Street
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A soft anime illustration of Nekomata Okayu as a catgirl walking through a sunlit city shopping street at golden hour, shown from a close three-quarter back view with her upper body turned slightly toward the viewer. She has short fluffy bob-cut hair in pastel lavender, a small ahoge on top, and 2 prominent cat ears with pale inner fur. Her face is fully obscured by a centered solid square censor block in a muted pink-beige color. She wears an oversized white hoodie with loose sleeves and subtle lavender trim at the cuff, a dark purple pleated skirt, and a thin black crossbody bag strap running diagonally over her shoulder. One hand is raised near her cheek as if shyly adjusting her hair, while the other arm trails naturally behind, giving the pose a gentle candid feeling. The background is a softly blurred urban pedestrian street with 2 storefront sandwich boards on the left, warm glowing shop windows, a few distant pedestrians, vertical banner signs, and leafy tree shadows stretching across the pavement. Use dreamy sunset lighting, peach and gold highlights, soft rim light on the hair and hoodie, painterly depth of field, delicate linework, and a cozy wistful slice-of-life mood.

entries.title: Neon Anime Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-energy Japanese futuristic anime magazine cover in portrait orientation, designed like a glossy feature issue packed edge to edge with neon cyberpunk graphics. The composition is split into 5 sharp diagonal polygon panels outlined in black, each panel containing a different anime character portrait. At the top, place an oversized bold Japanese masthead reading 次元交差 in huge distressed white lettering with pink paint splatter and motion-streak accents, spanning almost the full width. Above it, add a small Japanese subtitle line in white. In the top right corner, design a magazine issue block with the words "FEATURE", a very large outlined "01", "VOL.", "MEMMODE", "2024 SPRING", and small Japanese text "創刊号" stacked in a clean editorial layout. The background should be dense with electric magenta, hot pink, cyan, blue, and black abstract streaks, halftone dots, glitch textures, floating plus signs, diagonal slashes, and light flares, giving a loud next-generation visual-culture feel. Show exactly 5 characters: 1) upper left panel, a handsome androgynous anime boy with messy layered silver hair, pale skin, black clothing with straps, zippers, layered necklaces, and a cool dark streetwear look; 2) upper right panel, a cute anime girl with light lavender-pink hair in twin braids, large magenta-violet eyes, a black cap labeled MEMMODE, black X-shaped hairpins, and a black-purple outfit; 3) center panel, the main featured chibi-faced character with short white hair tipped with cyan and pink, one bright blue eye and one pink eye, wearing a glossy black cap and futuristic black outfit, looking directly at the viewer; 4) lower left panel, a serious anime boy with black hair and a bold white forelock, golden amber eyes, earrings, black hoodie and jacket layers, and blue neon rim lighting; 5) lower right panel, a softer feminine character with wavy blond hair under a dark cap, wearing a choker and holding a silver microphone near the chest, styled in pink-purple lighting. Make all characters highly polished, crisp, and vibrant, with large expressive eyes, sharp cel-shaded rendering, glossy highlights, and layered urban-tech fashion details. Add multiple editorial text blocks around the cover: on the left side a feature callout with Japanese text including "特集", a large stacked headline reading "交差する 5つの意志。", and two smaller Japanese lines below; a vertical side label reading "DIMENSION CROSS" and "MAIN"; a lower-left pickup box with "PICK UP", several Japanese lines, and 3 English hashtag lines such as "#IDENTITY #CONNECT #FUTURE", "#NEON #WILL #RESONANCE"; a bold page fraction "1/5 PAGE" at the bottom left; a bottom right focus box with "FOCUS" and small Japanese text; and a bottom-center Japanese tagline 新たな物語の、はじまり。. The overall style should feel like a premium anime feature magazine cover, chaotic but balanced, with aggressive diagonal framing, strong contrast, glossy print design, and a black base flooded with neon pink and cyan energy.
entries.description: This prompt generates a bold cyberpunk-style Japanese anime magazine cover with five diagonal character panels and dense editorial typography, ideal for mock magazine art or promotional key visuals.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-impact anime magazine cover in a futuristic cyberpunk editorial style, vertical full-page composition with dense Japanese typography and neon graphic design. The main focus is a close-up duo portrait in the foreground: on the left, a handsome anime boy with messy black hair streaked with bright cyan and a bold white front bang, sharp golden eyes, pale skin, a subtle confident smile, silver hoop earrings, and a black streetwear outfit with a hooded jacket, zipper details, layered shirt, and a black choker. On the right, slightly lower and partially overlapping him, a stylish anime girl with long wavy light-blonde hair, a black cap, oversized dark sunglasses, a glossy purple-and-white futuristic jacket, and one gloved finger raised near her lips in a cool pose. Surrounding them are 4 inset character portraits arranged diagonally along the upper-right side: 1 silver-haired anime boy in dark clothing, 1 purple-haired anime girl with violet eyes, 1 small silver-haired anime character with blue and pink highlights in the eyes, and 1 smaller brown-haired character near the lower-right edge. Use a dark black and deep navy background with electric magenta, hot pink, and cyan light streaks, glowing shards, splatter textures, halftone patterns, angular frames, and diagonal UI-like accents. The layout should look like a premium Japanese feature magazine cover, with large distressed metallic-white kanji headline across the top reading 共鳴する絆, smaller Japanese subheads and editorial callouts around the page, a top-right feature block reading "FEATURE VOL. 04 2024 SPRING 創刊号," a left-side focus block, a bottom-left page marker reading "4/5 PAGE," and small branding marks and decorative symbols throughout. entries.title: Casual Street Outfit Photo with Handwritten Text
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A candid street-fashion photo of a young Japanese woman sitting on a low concrete step in a narrow urban alley, shot in vertical portrait format with natural daylight and a slightly moody, realistic editorial look. She has long dark brown hair falling over her shoulders and wears an oversized navy track jacket with two white stripes running down both sleeves, loose light gray sweatpants, white crew socks, and chunky white low-top sneakers. Her pose is relaxed and slouched, knees bent and spread naturally, one shoulder leaning back against the wall, giving an effortless casual outfit snapshot vibe. The setting is gritty and authentic: weathered concrete walls, a metal door or utility panel, stickers, graffiti tags, exposed pipes, and a sunlit sidewalk with soft shadows. Add handwritten white Japanese text on the upper left wall in a casual marker style, arranged in 3 lines, reading exactly: "今日のコーデ\nわたしらしくて\nちょっとすきかも。" Keep the text looking naturally hand-drawn rather than typographically perfect. The composition should feel like a spontaneous social-media outfit post, with shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, subtle highlights on the hair, and understated muted city colors. Use navy, light gray, dark brown, 今日のコーデ
わたしらしくて
ちょっとすきかも。, and gritty Japanese backstreet alley.

entries.title: Pink Surreal Wall Street Fashion Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A surreal fashion editorial photograph on a city street modeled after Wall Street, shot from a slightly elevated front-facing angle in a tall vertical composition. The entire environment is nearly monochrome white and pale gray, with only selective pink accents standing out vividly. In the foreground, a faceless adult man stands in the middle of a crosswalk wearing a crisp white suit, white shirt, pink tie, and glossy pink dress shoes, holding 1 pink balloon in his right hand and 1 pink briefcase in his left hand. To his left, 1 surreal pink giraffe emerges vertically from a round manhole in the street, wearing a white top hat and a white collar with a pink tie, smiling playfully. Behind him in the center-left lane stands 1 pink alpaca or llama dressed in a white suit with a pink tie, and perched on its head is 1 small white cat wearing a tiny pink accessory, posed upright and looking forward. The street is lined with tall classical stone buildings, repeated columns, storefront windows, rows of identical potted shrubs, and multiple pale luxury cars and taxis receding into the distance. Include visible Wall Street-style street signs near the upper left corner. The road surface, cars, buildings, and sky should all be bleached white-gray for a dreamlike high-key look, while the pink elements remain saturated: the giraffe, the alpaca, the balloon, the briefcase, the tie, and the shoes. Style: whimsical surrealism, luxury editorial photography, immaculate symmetry, soft overcast light, clean cinematic realism, uncanny yet elegant atmosphere, ultra-detailed textures, shallow facial detail on the human with the face intentionally obscured or blurred.

entries.title: Kawaii Street Fashion Duo Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid street-fashion portrait of two cute anime-inspired girls standing close together in front of a colorful urban graffiti wall on a city sidewalk in Japan, photographed at eye level with a shallow depth of field and soft overcast daylight. Both have smooth pale skin and short blunt bob haircuts with straight ends, their bangs covering part of the forehead, and their faces intentionally simplified or blurred for an anonymous doll-like look. The girl on the left has silver gray hair, wears a black knit beanie with a rectangular patch logo reading "Nightfall", a black leather jacket over a white graphic T-shirt with a dark distressed illustration and purple accent graphic, layered silver chain necklaces including a heart pendant, a black choker, and a black backpack strap over one shoulder. The girl on the right has icy light blue hair, wears a black knit beanie with a white scribble-style logo, an oversized black hoodie with bold hot-pink Japanese graffiti lettering across the chest, a silver chain necklace, and black backpack straps on both shoulders. They lean in slightly toward each other in a relaxed, stylish pose, with one hand lightly touching the hoodie shoulder area. The background is a vivid mural wall in pink, blue, and purple tones, plus a sticker-covered utility pole on the right edge with visible layered street stickers including "SMILE", "AQUARIUS", and a red "HELLO my name is" sticker covered in tags. Emphasize Japanese street style, alternative fashion, kawaii cool mood, realistic fabric textures, crisp clothing detail, subtle cinematic color grading, and a trendy Harajuku snapshot aesthetic.

entries.title: Monkey Patrol in Cardboard Police Car
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A humorous photorealistic street scene in a busy Chinese market district in daylight, showing a tiny handmade police car driving down the road as if on patrol. The vehicle looks like a rough life-size toy or parade prop built from corrugated cardboard and tape, boxy and slightly crooked, painted white with dark blue police graphics, a red-and-blue light bar on the roof, the Chinese characters for police on the hood and side doors, the English word POLICE on the hood, a police badge emblem on the front doors, and a front license plate reading 京A8888. Inside and hanging out of the windows are 4 macaque monkeys total: 1 monkey in the driver's seat wearing a white police cap with one hand on the steering wheel, 1 monkey in the front passenger seat leaning out the window and pointing forward, and 2 monkeys leaning out from the left side rear windows, each extending an arm and pointing outward. The monkeys have expressive alert faces and tan-brown fur, making the scene look like a monkey patrol. Surrounding environment is a real urban street with scooters, pedestrians, market stalls, green canopy tents, and dense red Chinese storefront signage in the background, all slightly out of focus. Shoot from a front-left three-quarter angle at street level, with the cardboard car centered and moving toward the viewer. Bright natural midday light, candid documentary photography style, shallow depth of field, realistic textures, comedic absurdity, high detail.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Neon Alley Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic cyberpunk portrait of a futuristic street warrior standing in the center of a narrow neon-lit alley at night in a rain-soaked Asian megacity. Medium close-up framing from the chest up, subject facing forward, with the face partially obscured by a large centered rectangular censor block in muted teal-green. The character has messy glowing bright cyan hair, a visible cybernetic right eye area with metallic facial implants, cables and mechanical details around the neck and jaw, and a rugged high-tech armored jacket with straps, buckles, tubes, segmented plating, and luminous cyan and orange light accents. Use a dramatic teal-and-orange color palette, glossy wet pavement reflections, soft rain in the air, dense atmospheric haze, and heavy bokeh from neon signage in the background. entries.title: Rainy Night City Crossing
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic urban night street scene in heavy rain, viewed from a low street-level angle. In the foreground, 1 solitary pedestrian appears as a nearly black silhouette crossing left to right, mid-stride, holding 1 open umbrella overhead and wearing a dark coat with a backpack. The person's face is obscured by shadow and backlighting. In the midground on the right, 1 city bus approaches with bright warm headlights and an amber LED route display, slightly blurred by rain and motion. On the far left, 1 pedestrian crossing signal glows red with a raised hand icon. The street is soaked with large reflective puddles, creating intense mirrored streaks of red, blue, orange, and white neon and traffic lights across the asphalt. Tall buildings line both sides of the street as a dense downtown corridor, with scattered illuminated signs and windows fading into a deep blue-black rainy atmosphere. Emphasize glossy wet pavement, sparkling raindrops, bokeh light scatter, strong contrast, dramatic backlighting, moody noir mood, realistic photography, shallow depth of field, and vibrant over-saturated reflections. Use a widescreen composition, with the silhouetted walker centered-left and the bus positioned mid-right.

entries.title: Jing'an Temple Line 2 Station Entrance
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic documentary-style photo of the entrance area inside Jing'an Temple Station on Line 2 in Shanghai Metro, viewed from a passenger's eye level while walking toward the fare gates. The scene is a wide indoor station concourse with a modern ceiling made of dark brown curved wooden slats and long linear white lights. In the center hangs a large dark overhead wayfinding sign with a green square route marker showing the number 2 and the text "2号线 / Line 2," the main station name "静安寺站 / Jing'an Temple Station," and a service center icon with the bilingual text "服务中心 / Service Center." Below the sign are multiple stainless steel fare gates, with exactly 6 visible gate lanes in the foreground, some showing green arrow indicators and at least one showing a red no-entry symbol. Show a busy but orderly flow of commuters, around 10 to 15 adults in everyday autumn clothing, seen mostly from behind, walking into the station through the gates; include jackets, jeans, backpacks, shoulder bags, and neutral colors. On the left wall, include ticket or vending machines and another smaller green Line 2 sign. On the right wall, create a decorative white station wall with large black Chinese calligraphy reading "静安寺" and subtle wave-like graphic lines, plus a small green Line 2 marker nearby. Materials should feel authentic: polished gray speckled stone floor, metallic columns, tiled walls, and realistic transit fixtures. Lighting is bright, even, and fluorescent, with a clean public-transport atmosphere. Compose it as a slightly wide-angle smartphone photo, centered on the overhead sign and gate area, highly realistic, candid, detailed, and true to an actual Shanghai metro station interior.

entries.title: Romantic Tokyo Couple Photo Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A moody 4-by-3 photo collage made of 12 candid smartphone-style snapshots of a young couple during summer nights in Tokyo, shot with a nostalgic film look, soft grain, muted colors, slight blur, low contrast, dim ambient street lighting, and intimate casual framing. The overall tone is romantic, youthful, private, and documentary-like, with a warm gray-brown palette and a slightly desaturated teal-orange night city atmosphere. The man has messy dark hair, a slim build, and wears a dark overshirt or lightweight jacket over a white T-shirt; the woman has long dark brown hair, a slim build, and wears a white sleeveless top with thin black shoulder straps from a bag. In every panel, both faces are intentionally obscured by large soft-edged blur blocks for anonymity. Include exactly 12 images arranged in a tight seamless grid: top row panel 1, an extreme close-up side profile of the man at night; panel 2, the woman taking a mirror or phone selfie while standing beside the man outdoors at night; panel 3, the couple pressed close together near a street sign with Japanese text; panel 4, the couple kissing at a busy crosswalk in the city. Middle row panel 5, a pavement shadow photo of two people, one making a peace sign; panel 6, the couple standing close on a sidewalk in an urban shopping street; panel 7, a sunset skyline over water with Tokyo Tower visible, no people; panel 8, a high-angle shot looking down on the woman and the man close together on stairs or a walkway. Bottom row panel 9, a tight intimate close-up of the couple touching faces or kissing; panel 10, the man adjusting or touching the woman's hair on a city street; panel 11, the couple riding together on a scooter or motorcycle, both wearing helmets, captured in motion blur; panel 12, the couple embracing against a pale blue sky, framed from the shoulders up. Backgrounds should include Japanese city streets, storefronts, crosswalks, signage, buildings, night traffic, and urban evening ambience. Keep the composition casual and imperfect like real memories, with varied crops, soft focus, motion blur, and authentic handheld phone photography.

entries.title: Cinematic City Crash Explosion
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic ultra-realistic action scene on a rain-soaked urban street at dusk, showing a sudden multi-car crash and explosion in the middle of a modern city. In the foreground, one adult man with a blurred, indistinct face is running toward the camera between lanes, wearing a dark jacket and dark pants, his posture urgent and off-balance as if escaping danger. To his left is a dark gray sedan with headlights on, splashing through wet pavement. In the midground on the right, 2 wrecked cars are colliding: 1 silver sedan with its driver-side door open and 1 dark vehicle flipping upside down in midair, surrounded by shattered glass, torn metal, and flying debris. Count 2 visible fireballs in the background, one on the far left street and one large explosion on the right side, both sending sparks and black smoke into the sky. Show heavy smoke plumes rising above a dense downtown skyline of tall, slightly out-of-focus buildings. Include wet reflective asphalt, scattered car parts across the road, glowing streetlights, utility poles, overhead power lines, and a moody blue-gray storm atmosphere with orange firelight reflecting in puddles. Framing should be wide-angle and low to the street, with strong motion, dramatic perspective, cinematic depth of field, realistic physics, volumetric smoke, flying embers, and high-detail disaster-movie lighting. Add a white Pollo.ai watermark in the top-right corner.

entries.title: Urban Menswear Portrait on Overpass
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A natural-looking street fashion portrait of a young Japanese man standing on an urban pedestrian overpass in daylight, framed vertically from mid-thigh to head. He is leaning casually against a worn green metal railing with one hand in his coat pocket, body slightly angled, giving a relaxed but stylish candid pose rather than standing straight. He has medium-length wavy tousled hair in dark brown, soft volume around the ears and forehead, and a slim build. Dress him in layered neutral-toned winter fashion: an oversized wool coat in taupe beige, a chunky knit crewneck sweater in cream, and a long striped button-up shirt peeking out at the collar and hem. The mood is calm, refined, and contemporary, like a Japanese men's fashion editorial. Use soft natural sunlight with realistic skin tones, subtle shadows, muted colors, and shallow depth of field. In the background, show out-of-focus mid- and high-rise city buildings, bare winter trees, and a pale bright sky, creating a realistic Tokyo-like urban atmosphere. Photorealistic, understated color grading, detailed fabric texture, editorial composition, no dramatic effects, no text overlays, no extra people.
entries.description: This prompt generates a photorealistic vertical fashion portrait of a stylish young man in layered neutral clothing against a softly blurred Japanese city background, suitable for editorial or lifestyle imagery.

entries.title: Nostalgic Japanese Gal Grid Images
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create four 16:9 2K images as 3x3 grids based on the following prompt. Emotional images themed around Heisei Gal from late night to early morning. However, please randomly select photo situations from the <Theme> list without duplicates. Snapshot style using a film camera with direct flash. Features film grain, vignetting, and warm faded tones. Has the texture of a compact camera from the 90s to 2000s. Nostalgic and ephemeral photographs. 

<Theme> 
- Nighttime downtown area 
- Bench on the street - toasting with canned Chu-hi 
- Midnight park 
- In front of a game center - showing off UFO catcher prizes 
- Inside a Purikura machine 
- Dance game at an arcade 
- Crane game 
- Izakaya seating - toasting shot with peace signs 
- Karaoke box - singing passionately with a mic and tambourine 
- Family restaurant (Gusto/Denny's) at midnight 
- Ramen stall - slurping closing ramen 
- Club VIP booth 
- Bar counter - talking on a mobile phone with a cocktail in hand 
- Beef bowl shop (Yoshinoya/Sukiya) - meal before dawn 
- Last subway train 
- Taxi backseat 
- Station platform near the last train - running in platform boots 
- Manga cafe waiting for the first train - wrapped in a blanket 
- Passenger seat of a customized car (VIP car) - fur dashboard and LEDs 
- Taxi stand 
- Ferris wheel - shot inside the gondola with the night view in the background 
- Rainbow Bridge night view - leaning against a seaside fence 
- Love hotel district signs - alleys lit in neon pink 
- Rooftop parking lot - chatting while looking down at the night view 
- Park swing - mobile phone glowing while swinging at midnight 
- Seaside (Shonan/Odaiba) - fireworks on the beach at night 
- Shrine grounds - midnight test of courage 
- Selfie with a flip phone 
- Purikura book (planner) exchange - showing off heavily decorated sticker books 
- Para Para practice on the street - matching choreography under a streetlight 
- Bowling alley - high-fiving under lane lights 
- First train home in the morning - falling asleep exhausted with a Purikura bag on the lap 
- Inside an elevator 
- Sitting while adjusting loose socks - perched on station stairs 
- Video (DVD) rental shop - choosing a horror movie late at night 
- Playing ringtones on a flip phone 
- Shibuya Scramble at sunrise

entries.title: Cyberpunk Audi Rear Chase Shot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic rear three-quarter tracking shot of a futuristic white Audi supercar racing through a dense neon-lit city at night on a wet street, viewed from a very low angle close to the rear wheel. The car has a sleek widebody coupe silhouette, glossy pearl white body panels, a black rear fascia, and a continuous thin LED taillight strip with segmented red and white light elements stretching across the tail. The glowing Audi four-ring logo is illuminated in white at the center rear, with a stylized glowing model badge beneath it that reads "tron" in a futuristic font. The rear bodywork is partially removed or transparently open to reveal exposed high-performance mechanical components: 1 large rectangular metallic battery or power unit mounted low at the back, 3 visible thick exhaust or cooling pipes spanning across the rear, 1 visible gearbox or motor assembly near the center-right, and a deep black rear diffuser with 2 large fins. The car rides on oversized deep-dish black wheels with ultra-wide rear tires, and the tire sidewalls feature bright white Japanese-style lettering around the circumference. Use strong motion blur in the background and along the road surface to imply high speed, with sharp focus on the car body and exposed machinery. Surround the scene with abstract urban bokeh, streaking neon signage, reflections of red, blue, and white city lights across the wet pavement and glossy bodywork. High contrast, cyberpunk atmosphere, realistic automotive photography, dramatic nighttime lighting, ultra-detailed metal textures, cinematic lens, dynamic composition, speed, power, futuristic engineering.

entries.title: Night Drift Futuristic Sports Sedan
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic night automotive action photo of a futuristic white electric sports sedan inspired by an Audi e-tron GT, captured in a fast side-tracking shot while it drifts hard across a wet city street. The car is shown in clean left-side profile with the front pointing to the right, low and aggressive stance, black roof, dark tinted windows, black wheels, and a continuous thin LED rear light bar glowing red. The rear bodywork is radically modified and partially removed, exposing metallic turbo-like piping and mechanical components behind the rear wheel area. Thick white tire smoke billows from the back of the car and fills the entire left side of the frame. The pavement is glossy from rain and reflects blue, white, and amber city lights. The background is very dark with soft bokeh from distant buildings and streetlights, plus faint vertical poles and barriers, all heavily motion-blurred to emphasize speed. Use a moody urban color palette of black, steel blue, cool white, and warm orange highlights, realistic photography, high detail, low-angle tracking perspective, long-lens panning shot, dramatic reflections, shallow depth of field, and intense motorsport energy.

entries.title: Futuristic City With Sparkling Artifacts
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bright daytime futuristic city street viewed from pedestrian level, looking upward through a canyon of tall sleek skyscrapers with blue-tinted glass facades, rounded balconies, layered terraces, and elegant sci-fi architecture. The scene shows a bustling urban promenade with about 12 visible pedestrians in the foreground and midground, casually dressed and walking away from the viewer, including one central figure in a gray jacket. At the upper left, include 1 small hovering flying vehicle or drone-like air taxi. The buildings are highly reflective and polished, with integrated greenery: trees along the walkway and planted terrace edges. The sky is clear blue with soft sunlight, giving the image a clean optimistic utopian mood. Across the entire image, add a conspicuous artifact layer of dense multicolored sparkling dots and specks, like a noisy pixel grid or glittering digital contamination scattered uniformly over the architecture, people, sky, and street. Use a painterly semi-realistic style with soft focus, luminous highlights, vertical composition, and cinematic depth.

entries.title: Night Car Portrait With Popcorn
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic vertical smartphone photo of a glamorous young woman sitting in the front passenger seat of a car at night, shot from slightly above chest level in a tight mid-shot. She has dark brown hair pulled back loosely with soft strands near the ears, and is wearing a fitted ribbed brown zip-front top or dress with a deep neckline, partially unzipped, creating a sleek nightlife look. Her face is mostly out of frame or obscured, keeping the focus on pose, outfit, and mood rather than identity. She holds 1 large black tub of caramel popcorn in her lap with one hand, while her other hand is raised lightly near her chin in a casual, candid pose. The setting is the interior of a car with 1 visible beige passenger seat, 1 visible door panel with window controls, and a side window showing blurred colorful city lights outside, suggesting nighttime urban traffic. Use warm low-key lighting from the front-left, realistic skin texture, glossy highlights on the collarbone and fabric, shallow depth of field, bokeh streetlights, photorealistic detail, intimate composition, luxury nightlife atmosphere, and a moody editorial aesthetic. Outfit and palette should stay in coordinated brown and neutral tones, with the popcorn sharply detailed and slightly glossy from caramel coating. Render as realistic photography, high contrast, soft shadows, vertical 9:16 framing.

entries.title: Sunny Japanese Cafe Street Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bright, ultra-realistic summer streetscape in Japan, photographed at pedestrian eye level on a wide, clean urban sidewalk lined with mature green trees casting dappled shadows. The scene shows a modern mixed-use city block on a clear sunny day, with a contemporary cafe or restaurant on the right featuring tall glass windows, dark frames, a stone facade, and a warm wood soffit extending over the terrace. Place 3 large beige patio umbrellas outside the cafe, with wooden tables and chairs beneath them. Show a lively but orderly sidewalk with around 14 pedestrians spread into the distance, most dressed in light summer office-casual clothing in white, beige, navy, and gray. In the center foreground, include 1 person riding a bicycle away from the camera, wearing a short-sleeve white shirt and dark pants with a shoulder bag. On the right foreground, include 2 women walking away, one in a white blouse and long dark floral skirt holding a round hand fan, and one in a white top and light patterned skirt carrying a bag. Add 2 visible standing signs outside the cafe: one vertical banner with large Japanese text "氷" and icy blue graphics, and one sandwich board with Japanese text reading "夏季限定 冷たいドリンク" plus images of 2 cold drinks, one dark iced beverage and one pale lemonade-like drink. On the left side, show a quiet street with a few vehicles in the distance, benches, low concrete planters, and neatly trimmed shrubs. Composition should emphasize depth with a long vanishing point down the tree-lined boulevard, crisp midday sunlight, realistic reflections in the windows, and an upscale, calm urban atmosphere. Photorealistic architectural photography, natural colors, high detail, wide-angle lens, deep focus.
entries.description: This prompt generates a photorealistic modern Japanese city sidewalk with a cafe terrace, summer pedestrians, signage, and a cyclist, ideal for editorial urban lifestyle or travel imagery.

entries.title: Neon Rain Snack Bag Ad
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic commercial product photo of a glossy red snack bag standing upright on a wet city street at night, centered in frame, shot straight-on at eye level with shallow depth of field and dramatic orange neon lighting. The package is covered in realistic water droplets and reflects warm streetlights. The brand name on the bag reads CRUNCHY CHIPZ in very large bold white bubble letters with a thick dark outline, stacked across two lines in the center. Behind the logo is a jagged yellow-orange comic-style starburst graphic. In the lower right area of the bag, smaller printed flavor text reads ZESTY CHEDDAR, with tiny subtext below reading "FLAVORED CORN SNACKS." Near the bottom left edge of the bag, tiny text reads "SAVORY TRIANGLES." Show exactly 3 triangular corn chips total: 2 printed on the front of the bag and 1 real chip placed on the wet pavement in front of the package, leaning slightly back. The chips are orange, heavily seasoned, and textured. The background is a moody urban alley with blurred neon signs and round bokeh lights, all in deep amber, orange, and red tones, with glossy reflections on the rain-soaked ground. Ultra-detailed advertising photography, high contrast, sharp focus on the bag and front chip, premium snack packaging mockup, realistic condensation, rich saturated colors, studio-quality product retouching blended with a rainy street lifestyle setting.
