entries.title: Night Flash Portrait Outside Restaurant
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid nighttime street portrait of a young woman sitting casually on a woven bistro café chair outside a small urban restaurant. She has long black hair worn loose and slightly tousled, tan skin, and minimal natural makeup with a soft flash-lit glow. She wears a fitted white tank top layered over a visible black lace bralette and high-waisted relaxed blue jeans, with subtle gold jewelry: 2 thin bracelets on one wrist, 1 delicate necklace with a tiny heart pendant, and 1 slim bracelet on the other wrist. She leans diagonally toward the camera with one arm draped over the curved chair back and the other hand resting near her lap, giving an off-camera calm, detached expression. Shot vertically as a medium portrait from about thigh-up, slightly close and intimate, direct on-camera flash creating bright skin highlights, deep shadows, and a raw film-snapshot look with slight grain. The setting is a dark city sidewalk at night with storefront windows, black-painted exterior walls, warm interior reflections, and a glowing yellow sign in the upper left reading KOZY KORNER RESTAURANT, with a smaller lit sign below reading LIQUORS. Add a narrow red vertical neon glow in the background, distant streetlights and blurred city bokeh along the left side, and faint gold lettering on the glass door to the right. Include a clear glass bottle on the table edge at the far right. Authentic nightlife mood, stylish but unfiltered, shallow depth of field, realistic proportions, flash photography aesthetic, cinematic urban candid.

entries.title: Side-by-Side AI Portrait Comparison
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A side-by-side desktop screenshot comparing two nearly identical AI-generated street portraits in separate macOS-style image viewer windows against a light cyan background. The layout has exactly 2 vertical image panels, left and right, each inside a rounded gray window with a toolbar at the top. The left window title begins with "NanoBanana2" and the right window title begins with "ChatGPTImage2". In both panels, show the same scene concept: a fashionable young woman standing on a city street corner during golden hour, framed from about mid-thigh to head, with her face obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. She has long wavy brown hair, a slim figure, and wears an off-shoulder fitted cream long-sleeve top, high-waisted blue jeans, a delicate small pendant necklace, and a large black leather shoulder bag with a gold-tone chain strap over one shoulder. She holds a black smartphone in one hand near her waist. The background in both panels is an upscale tree-lined urban street with warm sunlight filtering through leaves, shallow depth of field, parked and passing cars, old stone buildings, and a visible green traffic light near the upper left area of each image. Keep the two portraits very similar but not identical: the left image is slightly cooler, softer, and more muted with a centered street perspective; the right image is slightly warmer, brighter, and crisper with stronger sunlight on the hair and more dramatic bokeh. Include exactly 2 viewer windows separated by a narrow vertical gap, with subtle drop shadows and a clean tech-comparison presentation, as if capturing a visual comparison between two image generation models.

entries.title: Urban Street Style Character Study
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: This scene is a medium-close shot using a eye-level lens, focusing on a young woman. She is shown in a three-quarter shot, sitting with a slight tilt, hips pushed back, legs naturally crossed with the left leg in front and right behind, knees slightly bent. She turns her upper body toward the back right, with her head facing the camera in a classic 'looking back' pose, eyes direct and clear with a hint of playfulness. Her hairstyle is voluminous brown shoulder-length short hair with natural bangs and slightly curled ends. Her makeup is light and natural, with slight eyeliner and natural nude-pink lips. The overall image uses a natural daylight filter, with light hitting from the upper left to create a soft back-lit silhouette. The face and right side of the body are illuminated by warm golden light, while the left side has a natural shadow transition to enhance three-dimensionality. The lighting effect is bright natural light with slight lens flare, creating an afternoon sun atmosphere. From an eye-level angle, the composition places the subject in the middle-right of the frame, with crosswalks and road lines in the background serving as natural leading lines toward the figure. The background is a city street including roads, crosswalks, green belts, and distant vehicles; it is moderately blurred but elements like trees, guardrails, and parked scooters remain recognizable. The composition uses the rule of thirds, with the figure on the right third to balance the frame. The subject wears a army green camo hooded sweatshirt, paired with black shorts and white high-top sneakers with white mid-calf socks. The backpack is black with orange-yellow decorative stripes and an orange plush pendant, made of canvas and leather. The overall style is street casual, with relaxed body language and a curious, playful expression, presenting an image of a spontaneous, youthful, and vibrant urban girl.

entries.title: Tokyo Nocturnal Urban Archive Diorama
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a highly realistic physical museum-diorama map titled TOKYO - NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE, showing Tokyo at night as a dense 3D architectural landscape archive model, photographed from an elevated oblique angle on a dark tabletop.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 3:2 composition, like a premium architectural archive board. The map fills most of the frame, with a thick dark border, thin cream drafting lines, coordinate ticks, and a bottom information strip. Use a restrained night palette: charcoal black paper, deep navy water, warm amber street lights, cool white building lights, subtle blue accents, and matte model textures.

Main scene: A detailed miniature city map combining a flat printed street plan with raised 3D building clusters. Roads glow as fine golden and white illuminated lines. Water areas are dark navy with glossy reflections. The terrain should feel tactile, with paper grain, tiny cast shadows, and realistic model-making materials. Include three prominent illuminated 3D landmarks: Tokyo Tower glowing warm orange near the lower center-left, Tokyo Skytree glowing cool blue and violet near the upper-right waterfront, and Rainbow Bridge crossing the bay in the lower-right. Include dense high-rise clusters around Shinjuku and central Tokyo, plus many low-rise city blocks.

Layout and labels: Add exactly 9 black rectangular callout labels with thin cream borders, each with Japanese text above small English text: 1) Shinjuku, 2) Shibuya, 3) Ueno, 4) Asakusa, 5) Tokyo Skytree, 6) Imperial Palace, 7) Ginza, 8) Odaiba, 9) Tokyo Bay. Place them near their corresponding areas, with subtle pointer alignment but no clutter.

Map grid: Add an archive-style index grid around the map. Use column numbers 1 through 10 along the top edge and row letters A through E down the left edge. Add small coordinate markings along the border, including latitude and longitude-style numbers. In the bottom-right information strip, include a small Index Grid box showing exactly 25 cells labeled A1 through A5, B1 through B5, C1 through C5, D1 through D5, and E1 through E5.

Bottom information strip: Along the bottom, create an archival legend and title block. Include a left legend box titled "Legend" with exactly 8 listed items and colored line samples: 1) JR Yamanote Line, 2) JR Chuo Line, 3) Ginza Line, 4) Asakusa Line, 5) Yurikamome Line, 6) Water, 7) Major Road, 8) Expressway, plus a small Park / Green swatch if space allows. Center-left title text should read TOKYO - NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE. Below it, add "Landscape Archive Model" and an archive code reading Archive Code: TKY-NAM-2024-001. Add a scale bar labeled "Scale 1:25,000" with distance ticks from 0 to 2.5 km. Add a north arrow in its own box near the right.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed editorial product photography, crisp focus, realistic depth, soft directional studio lighting from upper left, warm city glow, delicate shadows from raised structures, luxurious matte black board, cream ink drafting lines, museum exhibit quality. Avoid people, vehicles large enough to dominate, cartoon styling, bright daylight, messy typography, or extra landmarks beyond the labeled set.

entries.title: Paris Nocturnal Urban Archive Map
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a museum-quality physical diorama map titled PARIS - NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE, showing Paris at night as an architectural archive model with glowing streets, miniature landmarks, and engraved cartographic annotations.

Canvas: Horizontal 3:2 image, photographed from a high oblique angle like a premium tabletop exhibit. The map is a thick rectangular board on a dark studio surface, with a black-navy base, warm gold linework, subtle paper grain, raised relief terrain, cast shadows, and matte museum-display realism.

Layout: Fill the frame with one large rectangular archival city map bordered by a double gold frame. Add an alphanumeric grid around the map edges: letters A-K across the top and numbers 1-8 down both sides. The city occupies the upper three quarters; a structured information band occupies the bottom quarter.

Main city model: Render the Seine as a deep navy-blue river crossing horizontally through the lower middle with glowing embankments and bridges. Streets form a dense, accurate-looking Haussmann-style network of thin amber illuminated lines. Major boulevards glow brighter and have small engraved labels. Parks are darker textured green-black areas. Buildings are low, dark, and finely extruded, creating a tactile 3D archive model.

Count and place exactly 4 raised illuminated landmark models: 1) Eiffel Tower in the lower-left/left-center near the river, tallest and glowing gold; 2) Arc de Triomphe in the upper-left quadrant with radiating avenues; 3) Notre-Dame Cathedral on the island/river area near the center-right; 4) Sacré-Cœur / Montmartre basilica in the upper-right quadrant on a raised area.

Count and label exactly 15 district/area annotations in small serif gold type: "XVII BATIGNOLLES MONCEAU", "VIII ELYSEE", "IX OPERA", "XVIII MONTMARTRE", "XIX LA VILLETTE", "X ENTREPOT", "III TEMPLE", "IV HOTEL DE VILLE", "XI BASTILLE", "XII REUILLY", "XIII GOBELINS", "V PANTHEON", "VI LUXEMBOURG", "VII PALAIS BOURBON", "XVI PASSY". Also label "BOIS DE BOULOGNE" in the large dark park on the left.

Major route labels: Include "CHAMPS-ELYSEES" leading from Arc de Triomphe, "BOULEVARD HAUSSMANN" across the upper middle, "BOULEVARD SAINT-GERMAIN" in the lower middle, and "BOULEVARD BOURDON" or a similar small boulevard label near the right river edge.

Bottom information band: Divide the band into 5 visible panels from left to right: 1) legend panel, 2) compass panel, 3) central title panel, 4) scale/inset grid panel, 5) miniature regional locator map panel.

Bottom panel details: The legend panel must list exactly 5 symbol categories: Monument, Major axis, Boulevard, Bridge, Park / Garden, plus a water swatch beneath if space allows. The compass panel contains one ornate gold compass rose with N/E/S/W markings. The central panel contains the large title PARIS - NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE, the subtitle "CITY OF LIGHTS · HISTORIC CORE · HAUSSMANN NETWORK", and the archive code PAR-NAM-2024-001. The scale panel shows "SCALE 1:10,000" and a segmented bar from 0 to 1000 m. The locator panel shows a small outline map labeled "CENTRAL PARIS FRANCE".

Visual style: Ultra-detailed physical miniature, not a flat digital map. Use restrained nocturnal colors: charcoal black, navy water, antique brass gold, amber lights, and muted dark green parks. Lighting should feel like tiny embedded LEDs along streets and monuments, with realistic shadows, bevels, engraved typography, and archival cartographic precision.

Constraints: Keep all text in English or French-style Latin lettering as specified. No people, no cars, no modern UI, no watermark. Maintain a consistent premium editorial archive-map series aesthetic.

entries.title: Nocturnal New York Archive Diorama
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a highly detailed physical museum-diorama style archival city map of New York City at night, titled as a "Landscape Archive Model / Nocturnal Urban Archive." The image should look like a photographed, handcrafted architectural archive board: a flat printed map base with a raised 3D miniature city model emerging from it, illuminated by tiny warm building lights and cool navy ambient lighting.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 landscape photograph, three-quarter overhead view, the entire rectangular archive board visible on a dark tabletop. Use a deep navy, charcoal, brass, and warm amber palette. The board has a thick dark frame, subtle paper grain, bevelled edges, cast shadows, and tactile museum-model realism.

Layout: Center the raised 3D miniature of Manhattan, surrounded by flat engraved map regions and waterways. The rivers should be dark glossy blue with subtle reflections. The background map includes fine street grids, coordinate lines, latitude/longitude style guide marks, and archival border numbering. Add a precise top-and-side grid system with letters along the top and bottom and numbers down the left and right edges. Include thin brass annotation lines connecting labels to landmarks.

Main subject details: Show Manhattan as a dense raised cluster of miniature buildings with glowing windows. Make the Empire State Building stand tall near the center with a bright lit crown. Include One World Trade Center near the lower-left Manhattan area, the Chrysler Building to the right of Midtown, Times Square as a glowing central district, Central Park as a dark rectangular green-black void in upper Manhattan, and the Brooklyn Bridge crossing the East River toward Brooklyn. Surrounding borough and regional labels should appear flat on the map.

Text content and labels: Use elegant uppercase archival typography in off-white and brass. Include exactly 18 visible labeled map/annotation elements: 1) main title "NEW YORK CITY", 2) subtitle "NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE", 3) archive ID "NYC-NAM-2024-001", 4) top micro-label "LANDSCAPE ARCHIVE MODEL", 5) "EAST RIVER CORRIDOR STUDY / EDITION 01", 6) "EMPIRE STATE BUILDING / 1,454 ft / 443 m", 7) "TIMES SQUARE / THEATER DISTRICT", 8) "ONE WORLD TRADE CENTER / 1,776 ft / 541 m", 9) "CENTRAL PARK", 10) "CHRYSLER BUILDING / 1,046 ft / 319 m", 11) "BROOKLYN BRIDGE / 1,595 ft / 486 m", 12) "NEW JERSEY / HUDSON COUNTY", 13) "HUDSON RIVER", 14) "EAST RIVER", 15) "QUEENS / LONG ISLAND CITY", 16) "BROOKLYN / DOWNTOWN BROOKLYN", 17) "LEGEND", and 18) "ARCHIVE NOTES".

Inset panels: Include exactly 4 boxed information panels integrated into the board: a title panel in the upper left, a legend panel in the lower left, a scale-and-north-arrow panel along the bottom left, and an archive-notes/model-code panel in the lower right. The legend panel should contain exactly 6 line/icon entries: primary road, secondary road, rail line, water body, park/green space, and major landmark/building footprint. The lower-right archive panel should include model code "NYC-NAM-2024-001", model number "001", and sheet number "01 / 01".

Lighting and material style: Nighttime editorial photography, warm amber city lights, cool blue shadows, crisp miniature details, realistic depth of field, slight vignette, matte printed paper texture, metallic ink lines, raised resin/wood model buildings, tiny glowing windows, and realistic cast shadows. The overall result should feel like a production-quality architectural archive model photographed in a museum studio.

Constraints: Keep the design restrained, precise, and premium. Do not add people, vehicles, logos, watermarks, or modern UI elements. Preserve a consistent archival map language, make all text look printed on the board, and avoid fantasy or sci-fi styling.

entries.title: London Nocturnal Urban Archive Diorama
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic physical museum-diorama map titled LONDON - NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE, showing London at night as a raised 3D architectural archive model on a flat cartographic board.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 image, three-quarter overhead perspective, the entire board visible on a dark matte tabletop. Use a restrained nocturnal palette: deep navy paper, charcoal streets, warm amber city lights, muted gold cartographic lines, dark blue water, and subtle off-white typography.

Main scene: Build a detailed miniature relief map of central London with the River Thames curving across the lower-middle and right side. Streets should appear as dense fine-line grids with thousands of tiny warm lights. Parks are dark green recessed areas. Buildings are low matte extrusions with key landmarks rising taller and more sculptural. Make the model feel tactile and physical: paper grain, beveled board edges, cast shadows, tiny boats on the river, and realistic museum-display lighting.

Landmarks and callouts: Include exactly 6 vertical top annotation callouts with thin gold leader lines and small uppercase labels: 1) Buckingham Palace, 2) Big Ben / Palace of Westminster, 3) St. Paul's Cathedral, 4) The Shard, 5) The Gherkin, 6) Canary Wharf. Place them left to right across the top border. Represent the Palace of Westminster and Big Ben near the Thames with warm illumination, St. Paul's with a glowing dome, The Shard as a tall sharp glass spire, The Gherkin as a rounded bullet-shaped tower, Canary Wharf as a cluster of golden high-rises, and Tower Bridge as a lit bridge crossing the Thames.

Map labels: Add small uppercase neighborhood and place labels directly on the map, including Regent's Park, Marylebone, Oxford Street, Paddington, Hyde Park, Green Park, St. James's Park, Buckingham Palace, Kensington, Victoria, Westminster, Southwark, City of London, London Bridge, Tower Bridge, Bermondsey, Greenwich, River Thames, The Shard, The Gherkin, and The Tower of London. Use subtle cream or pale gold type that follows the archival map aesthetic.

Grid and border system: Overlay a precise atlas-style index grid with letters along the top and numbers down the sides. Use thin gold grid lines, double-line borders, and an engraved archival drafting style. The board should look like a premium landscape archive model, not a digital screenshot.

Bottom information band: Reserve a full-width cartographic footer divided into framed panels. Left panel contains a legend with exactly 6 symbol entries: Major landmark, Historic building, Park / green space, Water body, Bridge, Railway station. Center panel contains the large title LONDON - NOCTURNAL URBAN ARCHIVE, a subtitle reading LANDSCAPE ARCHIVE MODEL / 地景檔案模型, an archive code reading ARCHIVE CODE: LDN-NAM-2024-001, and a scale bar labeled in miles and kilometers from 0 to 3 miles and 0 to 3 km. Right side contains a compass rose, a small inset index grid map, and a coordinate note reading COORDINATE SYSTEM - BRITISH NATIONAL GRID - TRANSVERSE MERCATOR - OSGB 1936.

Style constraints: Ultra-detailed editorial product photography, realistic miniature materials, crisp but tiny readable typography, warm amber highlights against cool navy shadows, shallow depth of field only at the extreme edges, no people, no modern UI, no watermark, no extra legends or extra landmark callouts beyond the specified counts.

entries.title: Parody Luxury Product Advertisement
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: High-impact parody e-commerce infographic for "Four Loko" malt beverage. Foreground: An extreme close-up of a rough, weathered hand holding a tall, brightly colored can of Four Loko toward the camera. The can is slightly cold with visible condensation droplets and a loud, chaotic flavor design. The hand and can have a slight macro-lens blur for depth, with the can still reading clearly as the hero product. Central Subject: In the mid-ground, a funny, disheveled homeless-looking man sitting casually on a milk crate in an urban alley. He has a scruffy beard, messy hair, layered worn clothing, and a huge unbothered grin. He should look chaotic but oddly charismatic, like the accidental king of bad decisions. He is posed like a confident lifestyle-ad model, proudly showing off the can. Background & Lighting: A ridiculously polished ad-style backdrop mixed with a grimy city alley setting. Soft-focus urban textures, dumpster shapes, graffiti hints, and scattered clutter in the distance. Add dramatic studio lighting, soft glow, rainbow prism flares, and subtle light leaks to make the whole thing look way too premium for the subject matter. A few blurred Four Loko cans can float artistically in the background for extra absurdity. Typography & Layout (Bold sans-serif, white and neon accent styling): Top Center (Background): Massive, bold text reading "FOUR LOKO" positioned behind the subject. Top Right: Bold text reading "The Champagne of Bad Ideas". Mid-Left: "Premium chaos and zero self-control" Mid-Right: Large, bold "23" with the text "ounces of terrible decisions." Bottom-Right: Large, bold "1" with the text "can to ruin tomorrow." Optional small callout text near the bottom: "Now with more regret." Style: Ultra-detailed, 8k parody commercial photography, sharp focus on the can, shallow depth of field, vibrant trashy color palette, clean advertising composition, exaggerated premium product-ad aesthetic, funny visual contrast between polished branding and the wrecked subject.
entries.description: A complex prompt for a high-impact parody e-commerce infographic, blending a gritty urban subject with ultra-premium studio lighting and professional advertising layouts.

entries.title: 9/11 Twin Towers Street Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic photojournalistic street-level scene in lower Manhattan showing the World Trade Center during the September 11 attacks, viewed from several blocks away on a bright clear blue morning. The composition centers on the Twin Towers, with the left tower engulfed near the upper floors by a massive orange-and-black fireball, thick dark gray smoke billowing horizontally across the sky, and debris falling downward. The right tower stands adjacent with its antenna visible, partially obscured by smoke. In the foreground, exactly 6 visible bystanders stand in the street and on the sidewalk with their backs to the camera, watching in shock; the closest is a man in a light blue dress shirt at lower left. Surrounding the avenue are mid-rise city buildings, including a beige building with black construction scaffolding on the left, older brick and stone facades at street level, a tall curved streetlamp near center, traffic signs, and a dense urban canyon leading the eye toward the towers. Realistic documentary photography, high detail, natural daylight, long-lens compression, urgent historical-news atmosphere, sharp focus, no text, no watermark.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-angle aerial drone photograph of a modern urban transit hub in a dense mixed-use city district, captured in crisp late-afternoon sunlight with realistic architectural detail. The scene centers on a large multi-track rail station running diagonally through the frame, with 6 visible railway tracks, 2 long passenger trains at platforms, and a glass-covered station canopy near the upper middle. A broad pedestrian bridge crosses above the tracks from left to right, connecting plazas on both sides. In the lower middle is a bus interchange with 7 visible buses parked or moving through curved lanes and marked bays. Surround the station with tall contemporary residential towers, mid-rise office buildings, retail frontages, tree-lined streets, bike lanes, sidewalks, parked cars, and small groups of pedestrians. Include one prominent glass office building on the left with rooftop greenery and a visible corporate sign reading innovation. Add multiple green roofs and rooftop solar panels, especially on the lower-right building. Composition should feel like a clean, realistic North American transit-oriented development, viewed from an oblique bird's-eye perspective, ultra-detailed, natural colors, sharp focus, professional city-planning photography, no stylization.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic bird's-eye cityscape of a contemporary rail station and bus interchange, ideal for urban planning visuals, architecture presentations, or transit-oriented development imagery.

entries.title: Cinematic Night Street Conversation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic widescreen night scene in the style of an intimate romantic indie film, similar to a quiet conversation moment from Before Sunrise. On a city sidewalk at night, show exactly two young adults facing each other at a slight distance: a man on the left wearing a light beige button-up shirt with sleeves rolled up and dark trousers, one hand in his pocket, and a woman on the right wearing a simple black sleeveless dress, her dark hair tied back, hands loosely clasped near her waist. Use a modern downtown street with high-rise buildings in the background, with glowing office windows, distant traffic, blurred car headlights and taillights, and warm orange streetlights reflecting on the pavement. Compose as a wide 16:9 film still, both characters in profile or three-quarter silhouette, separated by an empty walkway leading into the depth of the frame. Lighting should be low-key and atmospheric: warm amber light from the left streetlamp, cooler blue light from a building on the right, soft bokeh, shallow depth of field, natural shadows, subdued contrast, realistic skin tones, and a moody late-night urban palette. Make it look like a real live-action movie frame shot on an anamorphic lens, with cinematic grain, soft focus falloff, no visible text, no watermark, no extra people in the foreground. Parameterize the mood as quiet, tentative, romantic tension, the man as young Asian man in a beige shirt, the woman as young Asian woman in a black dress, and the camera feel as naturalistic handheld indie film still.
entries.description: Generates a moody widescreen film-still scene of two young adults talking on a city sidewalk at night for romantic short-film storyboards.

entries.title: Doraemon Watercolor Silhouette Dreamscapes
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a watercolor-style illustration of Doraemon's head silhouette filled with three layered dreamlike scenes:

1. The top section shows a night sky with a large moon, a floating castle on clouds with stairs leading to it, UFOs, and Japanese text on the left side.
2. The middle section depicts four children (three humans and Doraemon) sitting on a suburban street with houses and a tree, watching the scene above.
3. The bottom section shows Doraemon leading three children walking down an illuminated street toward a waterfront with a dinosaur and a ship, framed by lush greenery.

Include the title "DORAEMON " at the bottom left with copyright text, and vertical Japanese poetry on the left edge.
entries.description: A creative watercolor illustration prompt that fills a character's silhouette with tiered dreamlike scenes, from night skies to illuminated waterfronts.

entries.title: Fortified NYPL Survivor Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic photorealistic street scene in Manhattan, shot from a low angle on the steps of the New York Public Library Main Branch on an overcast, blustery afternoon. In the foreground, place a lone tactical survivor, unnamed man, sitting exhausted on the stone steps, wearing all-black urban combat clothing: dark jacket, tactical vest, gloves, cargo pants, backpack straps, and a sheathed katana or long sword strapped vertically over his back. His face should be obscured by a flat dark rectangular censor block, while his black hair and ears remain partly visible. The library facade fills the right side: tall Beaux-Arts columns, arched entrance, carved stone details, steps, and a fortified barricade of tan sandbags stacked beside boarded-up wooden doors. The left side opens into a long avenue canyon of tall New York buildings, abandoned cars, scattered debris, dust in the air, and a damaged or overturned dark vehicle in the midground. Use muted gray daylight, cold desaturated colors, gritty realism, slight haze, dramatic depth, documentary-style composition, and a silent post-crisis atmosphere. Include exactly one seated survivor, one visible sword, one sandbag barricade, one boarded entrance, multiple abandoned vehicles in the background, and no readable added text or logos.
entries.description: A cinematic photorealistic prompt for creating a lone tactical survivor sitting outside a barricaded New York Public Library in a deserted post-crisis Manhattan street.

entries.title: Post-Apocalyptic Times Square Horde
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a wide cinematic post-apocalyptic scene in deserted Times Square during heavy rain, gloomy blue color grading, wet reflective pavement, towering skyscrapers forming a deep canyon perspective. In the foreground and midground, show one enormous tightly packed horde of undead pedestrians filling the street from left foreground into the far distance, with gray decayed faces, soaked dirty clothing, blank expressions, and slow forward movement. On the right midground, place one lone surviving hero standing small but elevated on the flat roof of one glass-and-metal bus shelter, wearing a dark hooded rain poncho or long coat, dark pants, and boots, holding one katana-like sword angled downward in one hand, facing the zombie crowd with a defiant stance. Surround the scene with trash piles, black garbage bags, cardboard, scattered debris, abandoned sidewalks, and puddles. The digital billboards and signs on the buildings should be mostly dark, broken, or glitching with distorted neon fragments in magenta, cyan, blue, and white; include a few flickering ad panels but no readable focus text. Use epic scale, high detail, photorealistic dark urban survival-horror style, rain haze, atmospheric depth, dramatic low-angle street perspective, and a sense of collapse and isolation. Avoid gore close-ups, avoid bright daylight, avoid clean streets, and keep the hero visibly much smaller than the surrounding city and undead crowd.
entries.description: A cinematic survival-horror prompt for generating a rain-soaked collapsed Times Square with a lone hero facing a massive undead crowd.

entries.title: Urban Fashion Character Concept Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform the person from the reference image into a stylized urban fashion character while preserving the person's identity, recognizable facial features, hairstyle essence, and overall likeness. Style: painterly character concept art, streetwear editorial illustration, semi-3D stylization, exaggerated proportions, slightly oversized head, long limbs, expressive facial design, rough hand-painted textures, visible brushwork, concept-art presentation.

Composition: full-body character on a plain light background, standing front-facing, centered, relaxed pose, fashion lineup feel, clean silhouette, vertical composition. Character treatment: keep the person recognizable, but reinterpret them as a stylized streetwear character. Use a sharper, moodier face design with strong eyebrows, expressive eyes, simplified planes, slightly exaggerated ears or features, and a cool rebellious personality. Outfit direction: oversized hoodie or sweatshirt with large hand-painted text, loose shorts, socks, sneakers, headphones or street accessories, layered urban styling, graffiti-like details, sketchy symbols, and subtle punk influences.

Rendering style: loose painterly strokes, visible brush texture, soft concept-art shading, slightly unfinished edges, artstation-style fashion character painting, matte color blocking with expressive details. Mood: edgy, rebellious, urban, alternative, cool, gritty but stylish.

Important: do not make it realistic photography. Do not make it glossy toy-like 3D. Do not make it anime or comic-book cel shading. Keep it painterly, stylized, and fashion-concept-art oriented.
entries.description: Transforms a reference image into a stylized urban streetwear character with painterly concept art textures and exaggerated proportions.

entries.title: Four-Panel Bank World Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished 2x2 storyboard-style image sheet for a short video scene about the despair of a zero bank balance, set in a modern blue-themed bank world.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition, four equal panels separated by clean white gutters, bright cinematic 3D-rendered realism with slightly idealized commercial lighting, high detail, sharp focus, saturated blue bank branding, no captions or speech bubbles.

Layout: Use exactly 4 panels in a grid.
1. Top-left panel: Interior ATM area with exactly 3 visible ATM machines in a row, each built into gray wall bays with bold blue vertical dividers. The nearest ATM screen prominently shows a large red "0" on a pale cyan screen, implying an empty balance. Include tiled floor, ceiling lights, and a small potted plant in the background.
2. Top-right panel: Bank service counter with exactly 1 female bank clerk seated behind a beige stone counter. She wears a navy suit, white shirt, blue striped scarf or tie, and a small gold nameplate. Her face is intentionally featureless/softly blurred for anonymity. Include exactly 1 computer monitor, 1 keyboard, 1 blue document tray, and 1 potted plant on or near the counter. Behind her are glass office partitions, blue chairs, certificates on the wall, and warm office lighting.
3. Bottom-left panel: Exterior of a contemporary city bank branch on a sunny street corner. Show a blue horizontal sign band above glass doors, gray stone facade, street crosswalk markings, sidewalk bollards, leafy trees, and black street lamps. The entrance should feel clean, corporate, and Japanese urban but without readable signage.
4. Bottom-right panel: Fantasy bank vault interior with an oversized round open vault door in bronze and steel. Inside the vault are stacks of cash and gold, warm golden lighting, shelves, and treasure props. Include exactly 3 small cute animal mascots standing near the vault entrance, wearing colorful tiny outfits, plus visible piles of bundled banknotes, coins, a chest, and a money bag.

Visual style: High-end 3D illustration, cinematic render, bank commercial aesthetic mixed with whimsical storybook detail in the vault panel, realistic materials, glossy glass, polished stone, metallic vault surfaces, warm highlights, deep blue brand accents.

Subject details: The bank's dominant brand color is royal blue. The ATM screen should display 0 in red. The bank clerk outfit should be navy suit with blue striped scarf. The vault should contain bundled cash, coins, treasure chest, and money bag.

Constraints: No extra panels, no visible watermarks, no logos, no readable text except the red balance number on the ATM screen, keep the four-panel sheet coherent as one bank-themed storyboard, maintain clean white borders between panels.
entries.description: A square 2x2 cinematic bank storyboard showing ATMs, a teller counter, a branch exterior, and a fantasy money vault for video concept art.

entries.title: Zero Balance Bank Storyboard
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic 2x2 storyboard collage for a short dramatic video titled Zero Balance Despair, showing one Japanese salaryman discovering he has no money and falling into despair.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, divided into exactly 4 equal panels with thin white gutters. Photorealistic, high-resolution, cinematic lighting, realistic Japanese urban bank environment. Keep the same main character, outfit, hairstyle, watch, and brown leather shoulder bag across all panels. The character's face should be intentionally obscured with a soft rectangular blur/mosaic block in every panel for anonymity.

Main character: A young adult Japanese businessman, messy black hair, navy suit, white dress shirt, loosened navy tie, brown dress shoes, silver wristwatch, brown leather shoulder bag. He looks exhausted, panicked, and emotionally overwhelmed.

Panel count and contents: Use exactly 4 panels.
1. Top-left panel: Inside or beside a bank ATM booth. The ATM screen clearly displays a large red "0" on a pale blue screen, indicating a zero balance. The businessman stands close to the ATM, shoulders tense, looking devastated, with his leather bag strap over one shoulder.
2. Top-right panel: At a bank service counter. The businessman leans forward toward a female bank clerk in a navy uniform, gesturing desperately with both hands open. The bank interior is clean and modern, with a blue counter, glass partitions, small signage, and warm office lighting.
3. Bottom-left panel: Outside the bank entrance. A blue sign above the door reads BANK. The businessman stands on the sidewalk in front of the bank with both arms thrown upward in panic, tie loosened, jacket open, brown shoulder bag hanging at his side. Bright daylight, urban street details, bollards, paving stones, and greenery.
4. Bottom-right panel: In a quiet park. The businessman sits slumped on a wooden bench, head bowed, arms hanging down, defeated. His brown leather bag rests on the bench beside him. Include trees, dappled sunlight, green shrubs, and a calm background that contrasts with his despair.

Visual style: Photorealistic Japanese commercial-drama stills, consistent character continuity, natural depth of field, sharp clothing detail, realistic bank and park locations, vivid but believable colors, emotional storytelling. No cartoon style, no extra panels, no captions except the ATM "0" and the exterior bank sign.
entries.description: A four-panel photorealistic storyboard of a Japanese businessman discovering a zero bank balance and spiraling into despair.

entries.title: K-Pop Dance Motion Sheet
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a high-detail 16-frame sequence sheet featuring a beautiful young Korean girl performing stylish K-pop-inspired dance choreography across all sixteen panels. The layout should look like a professional motion-study contact sheet or animation reference board, with each frame capturing a different dance pose and movement progression smoothly flowing into the next.
The girl wears fashionable modern Korean streetwear: fitted blue jeans, trendy crop top, subtle layered accessories, sneakers, soft natural makeup, and long flowing dark hair with movement visible during the dance. Her expressions are confident, elegant, charismatic, and slightly cinematic.
The setting is an aesthetic empty night street in Seoul, glowing with neon signs, warm street lamps, reflections on wet pavement, convenience store lighting, cinematic haze, and soft bokeh. She dances alone in a quiet corner street or alleyway with the entire focus and lighting directed toward her like a music video performance stage. Background should feel atmospheric yet not distracting.
Each of the 16 panels should show unique K-pop dance movements:
Intro pose
Hand wave motion
Hip sway
Side step
Hair flip
Arm extension
Spin transition
Mid-dance jump
Sharp choreography pose
Body roll
Footwork move
Dynamic lean
Turning pose
Confident close stance
Ending flourish
Final cinematic pose facing camera
Style: ultra-cinematic, Korean music video aesthetic, realistic photography mixed with editorial fashion energy, dramatic rim lighting, motion blur details, glossy reflections, cool blue and magenta neon tones, highly detailed clothing folds and hair movement, smooth pose continuity between frames.
Composition: clean evenly spaced 4x4 grid sequence sheet, all frames connected naturally like a dance progression study, full body visible in every frame, consistent character design throughout, professional choreography reference layout.
Ultra realistic, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, premium K-drama + K-pop MV atmosphere, high detail, photorealistic, dynamic motion capture feeling, stylish urban night aesthetic.
entries.description: Generates a 16-frame motion study sheet of a K-pop dancer, perfect for animation reference or character design.

entries.title: Tokyo Street Fashion Anime Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
spiky-haired boy and a dark-haired girl with pale lavender eyes, standing together in front of a graffiti wall.
The boy wears a brown oversized short-sleeve shirt over a white tee, white pants, layered silver necklaces, and has a calm confident expression.
The girl wears a white cropped "Honey" t-shirt, loose dark pants, and carries a white shoulder bag while holding a drink cup.

Urban sketch aesthetic with ink outlines, soft shading, drip-paint graffiti, doodles, crowns, and handwritten street art text in the background.

Modern manga/anime illustration inspired by edgy Tokyo street fashion, clean linework, muted brown/black/white palette, highly detailed hair and clothing folds, relaxed romantic vibe, full-body composition, white graffiti wall backdrop, stylish and aesthetic.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: {"type":"cinematic 8-panel storyboard collage","format":"wide 16:9 contact sheet with thin white gutters between panels","style":"warm golden-hour photorealistic 3D animation, soft depth of field, expressive family-film mood, high detail, cinematic lighting","branding":"small HIX AI logo in the top-right corner of the overall image","numbering":{"count":8,"style":"white rounded square labels with black numbers in the top-left of each panel","labels":["1","2","3","4","5","6","7","8"]},"main characters":{"girl":"","kitten":""},"setting":"","overall story":"","panel layout":{"count":8,"panels":[{"number":1,"position":"top-left","scene":"Opening scene on a tree-lined suburban street at sunrise. The girl walks toward school with her blue backpack, white picket fence, houses, parked cars, autumn foliage, and warm sunlight behind her."},{"number":2,"position":"top-center","scene":"In a narrow brick alley, the girl crouches beside a worn cardboard box. The orange kitten lies weakly near the box with one paw hurt, looking up at her; scattered debris and dramatic low-angle golden light."},{"number":3,"position":"top-right","scene":"Close-up of the girl gently wrapping the kitten's injured paw with a white handkerchief. The kitten's face fills the right side with large emotional eyes; shallow depth of field and tender hands in focus."},{"number":4,"position":"middle-left","scene":"The girl continues walking along the sidewalk with the kitten hidden in her backpack, only its fluffy orange head peeking out from the partly open zipper. Urban school street background with pedestrians and soft morning light."},{"number":5,"position":"middle-center","scene":"Inside a classroom, the teacher writes equations and a simple graph on the whiteboard while students sit at desks. The girl sits nervously near a sunny window, glancing down at her closed backpack on the desk."},{"number":6,"position":"middle-right","scene":"Classmates gather closely around the girl's desk in surprise as the backpack zipper opens and the orange kitten pops its head out. The girl touches the backpack protectively; everyone leans in with excitement."},{"number":7,"position":"bottom-left","scene":"Close-up from behind the kitten, now out of the backpack and facing a crowd of amazed students. Children's faces surround the kitten in warm light, showing delight and curiosity; the kitten's ears and fluffy back are prominent foreground shapes."},{"number":8,"position":"bottom-right","scene":"Final sunny classroom-window shot. The girl sits holding the orange kitten in her arms while classmates surround them happily petting it. Bright window, plants, warm afternoon glow, joyful emotional ending."}]},"visual notes":"Keep the girl consistent in every panel: mustard hoodie, ponytail, blue backpack. Keep the kitten consistently small, orange, fluffy, and injured with a white bandage on one front paw. Use cinematic compositions, warm amber sunlight, realistic textures, and a wholesome animated movie look. Faces may be softly anonymized or unobtrusive, but body language should clearly express compassion, nervousness, surprise, and joy.","negative prompt":"no horror, no blood, no cruelty, no text captions besides the eight number labels and the small logo, no extra panels, no distorted kitten anatomy, no duplicate main girl"}

entries.title: Sequential Fashion Storyboard Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A high-resolution cinematic storyboard collage composed of 20 sequential frames (4x5 grid), designed as continuous screenshots from a premium fashion advertisement video.

The same young male model appears consistently in all frames, wearing a clean, modern t-shirt with the brand name "Lyntilla" clearly visible on the chest in minimal, stylish typography.

The frames follow a natural motion progression like a real video sequence:

Row 1 (Intro - Establishing):
1.Wide shot - model walking into frame on an urban street
2.Mid-wide - approaching camera
3.Medium shot - slow confident walk
4.Slight turn - natural motion blur
5.Close-up - face + upper torso, calm expression

Row 2 (Engagement - Movement):
6. Adjusting collar (hands in motion)
7. Looking sideways, candid moment
8. Wind blowing t-shirt slightly
9. Hands in pocket, relaxed stance
10. Walking past camera (motion blur edge frame)

Row 3 (Detail - Product Focus):
11. Close-up of "Lyntilla" logo on chest
12. Fabric texture macro shot
13. Slight stretch of fabric showing quality
14. Over-the-shoulder glance
15. Side profile with soft light

Row 4 (Lifestyle - Emotion):
16. Sitting casually on urban steps
17. Laughing candid moment
18. Leaning against wall, streetwear vibe
19. Low-angle power pose (hero energy)
20. Final hero shot - direct eye contact, strong confident stance

⸻

🎥 Visual Style & Consistency
•Ultra-cinematic fashion ad style
•Golden hour + soft diffused lighting mix
•Shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh
•Subtle motion blur in transitional frames
•Warm, filmic color grading (slightly desaturated luxury tones)
•Clean urban + minimal studio hybrid backgrounds
•Consistent outfit, lighting continuity, and character identity
entries.description: A complex prompt for creating a 20-frame storyboard collage of a male model for a fashion advertisement, maintaining visual consistency across frames.

entries.title: Fox-Eared Streetwear Boy in Steampunk City
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a fashionable fox-eared young man sitting casually on the edge of a floating industrial platform in a vast vertical steampunk city. He has messy layered light blond hair with a small streak of deep magenta near one side, 2 large fox ears with pale inner fur, and a fluffy cream-colored fox tail curling behind him. His face is intentionally obscured by a flat square censor block centered over the face. He wears a glossy black bomber jacket embroidered with scattered floral patterns in 2 colors, red-pink and violet-blue, with ribbed cuffs and collar striped in dark red and black. Under it is a black graphic T-shirt with ornate gold lettering and emblem details, partially hidden by layered straps and necklaces. His outfit includes loose black cargo-style pants with zipper details, black socks with small gold lettering, and chunky black platform shoes with bright magenta laces. Add multiple silver rings, black suspenders or harness straps with metal buckles, and a long olive-gold hanging belt strap draped off the platform. Pose him in a relaxed seated posture with 1 knee raised and 1 leg extended diagonally downward, left arm resting over the raised knee and right hand planted beside him. The mood is cool, urban, and slightly rebellious. The background is an intricate labyrinth of towering pale teal and off-white mechanical structures, stacked platforms, scaffolding, hanging chains, exposed cables, suspended boxes, and several round clocks embedded in the architecture, creating a dense vertical futuristic-steampunk environment fading into atmospheric haze. Use soft daylight, muted pastel industrial colors, fine linework, delicate ink-and-watercolor rendering, crisp fabric highlights, and a polished contemporary anime illustration aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a stylish anime character portrait with fantasy animal traits posed against a dense industrial fantasy cityscape, ideal for character art and dramatic social-media illustrations.

entries.title: Melancholy Night Street Manga Spread
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A black-and-white manga two-page spread with a cinematic, melancholic tone, drawn in highly detailed seinen style with realistic lighting, wet pavement reflections, dense overhead power lines, and a star-filled night sky over a quiet Japanese residential street. The composition is divided into 4 panels total across the spread. On the left page, the top panel is a wide establishing shot of an empty suburban street at night, lined with low houses, walls, utility poles, glowing streetlights, and a slightly reflective road stretching into the distance. The bottom panel on the left page shows 1 teenage boy from behind, walking alone down the same street, wearing a dark school blazer, white shirt, loosened striped necktie, slim trousers, and carrying 1 shoulder bag slung across his back; his posture is tired and conflicted. Include 1 vertical oval Japanese speech balloon in this panel with the text 「やっぱり俺には」. On the right page, the top panel is a close-up of the boy's hand gripping the front of his blazer or shirt near the chest in a tense gesture, with 1 hand-drawn sound effect in Japanese reading 「ギュッ...」. The bottom panel on the right page is a chest-up frontal portrait of the same boy outdoors at night, messy short light-colored hair, school uniform slightly disheveled, emotional expression, shoulder bag strap visible, background filled with soft glowing night bokeh and stars. Place 1 vertical oval Japanese speech balloon beside him reading 「でも...悔しい」. Obscure the center of his face with a flat square gray censor block. At the bottom of the right page, add 1 rectangular narration box containing the Japanese text 「才能に出会ってしまったー」. Show printed manga page layout with white gutters, page numbers 17 and 18 centered at the bottoms of the left and right pages, and a clean book-spread presentation. Keep everything grayscale, dramatic, introspective, and polished like a published manga volume.

entries.title: Helicopter Over Urban Dust Cloud
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic ultra-realistic aerial disaster scene viewed from slightly above and behind a single military transport helicopter flying over a dense urban neighborhood at golden hour. The helicopter is a dark weathered matte-gray utility helicopter with 1 main rotor and 1 tail rotor, seen from the rear-right side, angled toward the upper right of the frame, with visible panel lines, antennas, landing gear, tail stabilizers, and an open side door. Below it, a massive rolling dust cloud from a building collapse or explosion surges through tightly packed city blocks, forming 1 huge mushrooming wall of beige-gray debris with turbulent texture, smaller plumes, and swirling particulate noise spreading between rooftops. The city beneath is sprawling, crowded, and sunlit in warm amber tones, with low-rise buildings, narrow streets, scattered highlights on roofs, and haze in the distance. Emphasize rotor motion blur, volumetric dust, dramatic scale, harsh backlit sunset lighting, long shadows, atmospheric perspective, intense contrast between the dark helicopter and glowing dust, and a tense war-zone or rescue-operation mood. Photorealistic, blockbuster cinematography, high detail, realistic materials, dynamic composition, wide aerial shot, no text, no interface, no extra aircraft.
entries.description: A photorealistic cinematic prompt for generating a dramatic aerial helicopter scene above a city engulfed by a massive collapse or explosion dust plume.

entries.title: Hard-Boiled Noir Manga Woman Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A gritty black-and-white hard-boiled manga page in a high-contrast ink wash style, arranged as a single comic page with 9 distinct panels of varying sizes and diagonal borders. The main subject is a mysterious adult woman with black long messy hair, a curvy build, an off-shoulder dark knit dress or sweater, a choker necklace, and dangling cross earrings, portrayed as a noir antiheroine. Her face is intentionally obscured by shadow, blur, or framing in multiple panels, giving her an anonymous and dangerous presence. The page uses dramatic brush textures, rain-soaked urban grime, splattered ink, heavy blacks, and cinematic lighting. Panel 1 at the top left shows a nighttime city skyline under rain with glowing windows and the vertical Japanese narration text: 「この街はいつも雨が降っている」. Panel 2 at the top center is a bust portrait of the woman facing forward, hair spilling across her shoulders, with her face obscured. Panel 3 at the top right shows her from behind walking down a narrow alley or wet street, with the vertical text: 「あたしの名前は誰も知らない」. Panel 4 in the middle left is an extreme close-up of one eye with the vertical text: 「知ってるのは裏の顔だけ」. Panel 5 in the middle center-left shows an overhead urban scene of buildings or city blocks with the vertical text: 「金と嘘と裏切りがこの街のルール」. Panel 6 in the middle center-right shows a close-up of hands, money, or a violent underworld exchange with the vertical text: 「でもあたしはそのルールの外側で生きてる」. Panel 7 in the middle right is a dark partial close-up of the woman in shadow with the vertical text: 「守るものなんか最初からなかった」. Panel 8 at the lower left is a medium shot of the woman standing with folded arms, with the vertical text: 「あるのは譲れないたったひとつの信念だけ」, and below it a small inset panel of 2 people seated at a bar counter at night with bottles and dim lights, accompanied by the vertical text: 「夜が明けるまでに片をつける」. Panel 9, the dominant lower-right panel, shows the woman aiming a handgun directly at the viewer in extreme foreshortening, hair whipping, body angled forward, with bold large vertical Japanese text split across the panel: 「あたしの正義は」 and 「あたしが決める」. Keep all visible text in Japanese exactly as written. Emphasize a seinen crime manga aesthetic, hard-boiled female vigilante energy, wet neon-noir atmosphere, rough pen lines, ink splatter, and dramatic panel composition.

entries.title: Fantasy Tokyo Coexistence Cityscape
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A wide cinematic anime key visual of a bustling modern Tokyo-like district transformed into a multicultural fantasy metropolis under a bright blue midday sky with fluffy clouds. The scene is viewed from street level along a broad pedestrian avenue leading toward a large red torii gate at the center distance, with stone steps, crowds of people, dense commercial buildings, and a Japanese castle rising on a green hill behind the city blocks. A very tall broadcasting tower resembling Tokyo Skytree stands slightly right of center in the background. Fill the sky with exactly 8 airborne fantasy and sci-fi elements: 2 large dragons in flight, 2 winged humanoid angels, 1 huge flying saucer, and 3 smaller UFOs scattered farther away. The city should feel like a coexistence society where humans and fantasy races live together naturally. Add many colorful digital billboards and vertical signs on buildings, including Japanese text and fantasy character advertisements; the largest curved screen on the left should display the text "Shinpi Sekai 神秘世界 ようこそ," and a lower billboard should reference a multicultural society of different races. In the foreground, place exactly 6 prominent characters across the street scene: on the far left, a tall elf schoolgirl with long brown hair, pointed ears, a white blouse, ribbon tie, and plaid skirt; left-center, a humanoid crocodile or lizard man in casual urban clothes with a jacket and pendant; near him, a small child with animal-like ears wearing a red backpack and scarf; center-left, a white-haired young man with white feathered wings in a light jacket; center-right, a silver-haired cat-eared schoolgirl in a light jacket and dark pleated skirt; right-center, a black-haired teenage boy in a black hoodie with a backpack; and on the far right, a blonde elf schoolgirl with pointed ears, white short-sleeve shirt, tie, and brown plaid skirt. In the midground and background, add a crowd of pedestrians including a few more fantasy species. Also include exactly 3 additional perched or elevated fantasy figures on the right side architecture: 1 dark-clad black-winged girl standing on a ledge, 1 small blonde fairy-like winged girl floating near a rooftop, and 1 tiny golden winged creature near the street. Style: polished high-detail anime illustration, light novel promotional art, sharp linework, vibrant colors, clean atmospheric perspective, crisp sunlight, soft shadows, highly detailed urban signage, a sense of wonder, coexistence, and worldbuilding.

entries.title: Anime Tunnel Driving Cockpit Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic anime-style interior car scene viewed from the back seat over the shoulder of a young woman with shoulder-length black hair driving through a dim urban tunnel at night. She grips a classic three-spoke steering wheel with both hands, left hand around 10 o'clock and right hand around 3 o'clock, wearing a wristwatch on one wrist and a thin bracelet on the other, with a loose light-colored shirt and rolled sleeves. The dashboard is a vintage sports car cockpit with 4 visible round analog gauges glowing warm orange-red, a retro radio console, metallic trim, and a manual gear shifter in the lower right foreground. Outside the windshield, show dense tunnel traffic with multiple cars ahead, red brake lights, harsh overhead tunnel lights receding into the distance, and rough concrete walls streaked with speed lines. Composition is wide and immersive, emphasizing the driver's hands, steering wheel, and instrument cluster, with the driver's face seen in partial side profile on the left edge. Render in gritty manga-inspired linework with heavy ink hatching, dark shadows, muted blue-gray and black tones, and warm highlights from the dashboard and tunnel lights. Mood is tense, focused, nocturnal, and stylish, like a dramatic street-racing or thriller anime frame.

entries.title: Neuron on a San Francisco Cable Car
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A whimsical cinematic portrait of an anthropomorphic neuron riding on the outside step of a classic San Francisco cable car at golden hour. The character has a large neuron head with a rounded central body and dozens of long branching dendrites radiating outward like a crown, textured in pale lavender, mauve, and fleshy gray with subtle organic sheen. Its face area is obscured and featureless. The figure is dressed like a Victorian or Edwardian gentleman commuter: dark tweed jacket, patterned waistcoat, collared shirt, necktie, pinstriped trousers, polished brown leather shoes, and a pocket watch chain. One hand grips a brass pole on the cable car, and the other hand holds up a vintage transit ticket reading "MUNICIPAL RAILWAY SAN FRANCISCO ADMIT ONE." Add a small round lapel pin that says "MUNI." A slender purple tail-like axon curls behind the body. The cable car is richly detailed varnished wood and brass, with a route sign on the side reading "POWELL AND MARKET / HYDE AND BEACH / FISHERMANS WHARF." In the background, show a steep San Francisco street with cable tracks descending into the distance, a second cable car far down the hill, dense urban buildings on both sides, and Coit Tower visible on a hazy hilltop. Warm nostalgic lighting, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed textures, surreal realism, humorous but elegant mood, centered full-body composition, vertical framing.
entries.description: A surreal cinematic character portrait of a neuron dressed as a vintage commuter riding a classic San Francisco cable car, ideal for whimsical editorial or AI art prompts.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Manga Page of a Giant Robot Cat
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed black-and-white manga page showing a gigantic mechanical cat walking through a dense nighttime Japanese city street. The page has 4 panels total: 1 wide top panel spanning the full width, 2 smaller stacked panels on the bottom left, and 1 tall large panel on the bottom right. In the top panel, a colossal robotic cat dominates a narrow neon-lit alley lined with tall buildings, tangled power lines, vertical shop signs, and tiny pedestrians staring upward in shock. The cat has realistic feline proportions but is built from exposed armor plates, rivets, pistons, cables, gears, segmented metal limbs, and intricate machine internals, with a tag hanging from its neck that reads "猫神". The wet street reflects city lights. Add multiple Japanese signs in the environment including "古書 2F", "万事屋 B1", and "酒処". Include a large manga speech bubble in Japanese in the upper right of the top panel reading "うわっ?でっけえ!!". In the upper bottom-left panel, show a close-up of a long-haired woman seen from behind and slightly to the side, looking toward the creature, with a vertical Japanese speech bubble reading "...何でこんな街にこんなものが...". In the lower bottom-left panel, show a group of startled onlookers from the front, including a young man in the foreground and other shocked pedestrians behind him, with a vertical Japanese speech bubble reading "神様の使いか!?". In the tall bottom-right panel, show a dramatic low-angle close-up of the mechanical cat towering between buildings under a bright moon, emphasizing its chest machinery, massive forelegs, whiskers, and regal face, with the neck tag "猫神" clearly visible. Add a large stylized Japanese sound effect near the cat reading "カシ...". Use classic seinen manga aesthetics, cinematic panel composition, fine ink crosshatching, heavy contrast, detailed urban textures, realistic crowd scale, and a sense of awe, mystery, and divine cyberpunk presence.
entries.description: This prompt generates a detailed monochrome manga comic page of a massive mechanical cat in a Japanese city, ideal for cinematic sci-fi illustration or manga-style concept art.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Girl with Giant Claw Arm
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark cyberpunk anime illustration of a lone young woman with a massive mechanical claw arm standing in a rainy neon-drenched alley at night, viewed from a dramatic low angle that makes her look imposing and dangerous. She has a pale face, long straight black hair partly hiding her eyes, and faintly glowing red eyes with a cold, emotionless expression. She wears an oversized hooded winter-tech coat with a large fur-trimmed hood and fur cuffs, layered black tactical streetwear, straps, belts, and baggy dark pants tucked into heavy boots. Her left arm is replaced by an enormous industrial mech prosthetic that dominates the foreground, packed with dense gears, pistons, tubing, cables, exposed mechanisms, and glowing red indicator lights, ending in 3 long curved talons with razor-sharp tips lit from within by crimson energy. Add small decals, warning labels, and vertical East Asian signage on the coat and machinery. Set her in a narrow futuristic city street filled with towering buildings, hanging cables, mist, and many vertical neon signs with Chinese characters in red and cyan-green. The pavement is wet and mirror-like, reflecting the red lights from the claw and the surrounding signage. Use a gritty, ultra-detailed, high-contrast palette of charcoal black, gunmetal, deep crimson, and sickly teal. The mood is cold, moody, intimidating, intelligent, and slightly melancholic. Highly detailed linework, complex mechanical rendering, cinematic lighting, rain haze, urban density, anime-meets-hard-surface concept art, masterpiece quality.

entries.title: Explosive Shonen Manga Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a hyper-detailed Japanese weekly shonen manga magazine cover, full-bleed, explosive and crowded, with no empty space. The format is a single vertically oriented magazine cover illustration packed with layered typography, character art, motion effects, and urban sci-fi chaos. At the top, a gigantic stylized Japanese masthead in fiery orange-red with heavy black outline and gold edging dominates the width of the page, reading 週刊少年ブレイズ, with a small celebratory badge integrated into the title showing 40年. Add a small slogan line across the very top edge in Japanese. In the top right corner, place a black issue-information box with bright yellow and white text showing the date 2026年4月22日号 and the price 特別価格 380円. The main image features exactly 3 anime characters in a dynamic triangular composition. In the center foreground, the star heroine lunges toward the viewer with strong foreshortening, one hand thrust out almost touching the camera. She is a teenage gyaru-style action heroine with light brown with pink streaks long wavy hair flying wildly, sharp golden-brown eyes, a confident mischievous grin, sun-kissed skin, multiple ear piercings, and a flashy rebellious street-fighter vibe. Her outfit is black and gold with exactly 6 key visible pieces: a cropped top, a short jacket with metallic trim, short shorts, a belt with dangling chains, a thigh strap on one leg, and fingerless gloves. Add gold lightning motifs and glossy highlights across her clothing. Around her hand and body, draw arcs of yellow energy and speed streaks to emphasize impact. Behind her on the left midground, place a white-haired teenage boy in a black-and-white futuristic combat outfit, crouched aggressively and aiming a large mechanical gauntlet or weapon toward the viewer, surrounded by icy blue shards and angular motion lines. Behind her on the right midground, place a pink-haired teenage girl with twin tails or tied-up hair, wielding a circular bladed ring weapon, posed in motion with vivid magenta energy trails. In the upper right background, add a fourth visual focal area but not a separate main character count: a dark-haired teenage boy in a green-black combat suit aiming a glowing sci-fi rifle diagonally across the page, partially obscured by text and effects, embedded into the background action. The background is a dense neon-lit futuristic Japanese city street at night with tilted perspective, towering signs, debris, sparks, shattered fragments, electric streaks, and saturated blues, purples, pinks, and oranges. Use extreme contrast, glossy print texture, ink splatter accents, halftone-like manga magazine energy, and premium anime key visual rendering. Add large dramatic Japanese cover copy on the left in stacked blocks with thick white, yellow, red, and black lettering, including the prominent headline 新時代をブチ抜く 超熱量ヒロイン ここに爆誕!!. Add exactly 5 left-side feature callouts in colored rectangular boxes with bold names and smaller subtitle lines beneath: 雷閃ブレイカー / 天城ノア, 空駆けエンジン / 南雲ハヤト, 魔境デリバリー / 倉科ミツル, 白狼ストライカー / 久世リョウ, 超深海クラッシュ / 早瀬シン. Add exactly 5 right-side feature callouts in matching bold boxes: 極光パレット / 鳴海ユウト, 機巧グラフィティ / 胡野レイ, 龍骨ランナー / 火野アツシ, 王冠のラグナ / 深町カイ, 風神リベリオン / 東雲ガク. Also add exactly 3 promotional bursts on the right side in starburst or explosive label shapes with large yellow and white lettering: 巻頭カラー, 特大ポスター付き, 新連載スタート. Make the entire cover feel like a blockbuster debut issue for a hot new battle manga era, energetic, rebellious, flashy, polished, and unmistakably like a high-impact Japanese manga magazine cover illustration.

entries.title: Find Kyle in a Seoul Market
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A richly detailed vertical editorial travel illustration of a bustling Seoul market alley rendered in polished hand-drawn realism with warm cinematic lighting, dense urban storytelling, and highly legible signage. The scene is packed with a large crowd of pedestrians, shoppers, diners, street-food customers, musicians, and commuters in a narrow neighborhood market street, viewed from a slightly elevated eye level so the full alley feels layered and alive. At the top left, a large illustrated poster reads "WHERE IS KYLE?" with the subtitle "Can you find Kyle in Seoul?" in bold playful English typography, styled like a search-and-find book cover. The environment should clearly be Seoul, with a visible Namsan tower in the distant skyline, tangled overhead power lines, rooftop seating, stacked low-rise buildings, shop signs in Korean, and a subway entrance sign on the right showing line numbers 4, 2, 4, 4 and the bilingual text "서울역 방면 / To Seoul Station." Include exactly 15 major visible signs or text panels: 1) the "WHERE IS KYLE?" poster, 2) "할머니 손칼국수", 3) a hanging vertical sign "낙원상가 2F", 4) a small blue street sign, 5) a vertical sign "이름 떡볶이", 6) the large market arch sign "황진다운시장 영", 7) a vertical orange sign "커피", 8) a wall mural map with "남산 가는길", 9) the subway sign with "출입구 4" and "서울역 방면 / To Seoul Station", 10) the produce sign "경성 야채", 11) the lower produce sign "신선한 채소", 12) a handwritten busker sign, 13) the street-food cart sign "호떡·어묵·붕어빵", 14) the menu board "오늘의 추천 김밥 떡볶이 순대 튀김", and 15) the delivery box text "빠른 배달". Populate the alley with exactly 8 vendor or activity zones: 1) a noodle restaurant at left under a red-and-white awning with seated diners, 2) a vegetable stall with stacked produce crates, 3) a busking duo with guitar and percussion, 4) a central street-food cart selling hotteok, fish cake, and bungeoppang, 5) a standing crowd eating snacks and holding cups, 6) a small magic performance table in the lower center with cards and cups, 7) a painter at an easel near the lower left, and 8) a scooter delivery cluster at the lower right. Add exactly 6 notable background accents: 1) rooftop diners on the upper right terrace, 2) a cat lounging on a roof ledge upper left, 3) colorful market umbrellas in the middle distance, 4) stairways and narrow side passages, 5) dense balconies and windows full of plants and people, and 6) the distant tower and skyline. The crowd should feel extremely varied in age and clothing, mostly casual contemporary Korean street fashion in jackets, hoodies, backpacks, skirts, slacks, and sneakers, with a few office workers and students. Hide a single subtly distinct person meant to be the findable target, a young man in a blue hoodie with yellow lettering, integrated naturally among the central crowd rather than spotlighted. Use a vibrant but grounded palette of brick red, teal, forest green, cream, mustard, asphalt gray, and sky blue. Emphasize intricate linework, readable Korean text, observational city details, lively human gestures, and the playful feel of a premium "Where's Waldo?" style Seoul search poster. Aspect ratio 2:3.

entries.title: Urban Streetwear Hoodie Mockup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a premium urban streetwear fashion campaign photograph featuring a confident male model wearing an oversized black hoodie in a gritty city setting. The model has a medium-dark skin tone, short black hair, and stands front-facing from mid-thigh up with his hands in his pants pockets, shoulders relaxed, projecting calm confidence. His face is intentionally anonymized by a centered vertical rectangular block of solid warm brown color covering the face from forehead to chin, while the top of the hair and ears remain partly visible. The hoodie is heavy black fleece with a large hood, dropped shoulders, ribbed cuffs, kangaroo pocket, and subtle realistic fabric texture. Add bold light gray chest branding: large text "ABKR", smaller spaced text "URBAN STREETWEAR", and a small circular icon plus the phrase "BUILT FOR MOTION". On the model's left sleeve, place vertical bold text "CITY MOTION" and small stacked technical microtext near the cuff reading "UTIL.01 / SPEC URBAN / PERFORMANCE". Add a tiny woven label near the lower right hem reading "ABKR / STUDIO". Pair the hoodie with black cargo-style pants. Background: an urban concrete wall and pillar with visible bolt holes and graffiti on the left, plus a dark metal roll-up shutter with blurred graffiti on the right. Lighting is moody and cinematic, soft directional daylight from the upper left, deep shadows, muted gray-black palette, shallow depth of field, high-end editorial realism, sharp focus on the hoodie graphics and fabric, vertical 4:5 composition. Avoid extra accessories, avoid bright colors, avoid additional people, and keep all typography clean, modern, and legible.
entries.description: A realistic fashion campaign prompt for showcasing customizable branding on a premium black urban hoodie.

entries.title: Rainy Dutch Street Vintage BMW
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic cinematic street photograph of a black vintage BMW coupe from the 1970s parked at the curb in a quiet Dutch canal-neighborhood street after rainfall. The car is front-facing at a slight angle, centered slightly right, with chrome trim, round headlights, a yellow Dutch license plate reading 03-XR-BL, and visible raindrops on the hood and windshield. The setting shows recognizable Dutch street features: narrow brick sidewalk and wet brick paving, small puddles reflecting sunlight, tall narrow brick townhouses with large windows on both sides, bicycles parked along railings and facades, a blue parking sign, slim street trees with fresh green leaves lining the road, and a softly blurred row of parked cars in the background. Sunlight breaks through after rain, creating warm highlights on the wet street while the overall mood remains slightly moody and nostalgic. entries.title: Gothic Lolita Subway Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a moody cinematic night photograph of two fashionable anime-inspired gothic lolita women standing close together in a wet New York City subway entrance, framed from mid-thigh upward in a 3:2 horizontal composition. The setting is a tiled stairwell corridor with glossy dark green and cream subway tiles, brass handrails, rain-slick reflections, warm amber station lights, and a sign in the background reading "UPTOWN & THE BRONX" above a "14 Street Union Square Station" information board. The left woman has pale lavender silver short bob hair with side-swept bangs, a delicate cream lace headband with ribbons and a flower bow, a dark plum velvet tailored jacket, a champagne satin scarf, a pale blouse with a large bow at the neck, and a dark skirt; her arm rests around the other woman's shoulder. The right woman has icy light blue straight bob hair with blunt bangs, a black lace headdress with long ribbon tails, small dark glasses, a black velvet coat with sharp lapels, and a dark purple patterned scarf tied at the neck. Both figures should look like realistic cosplay fashion models with porcelain doll styling, but their faces are intentionally hidden by flat opaque muted taupe rectangular censor blocks centered over each face. Use rich nocturnal color grading, high contrast, cinematic street photography realism, shallow depth of field, wet reflective surfaces, glowing bokeh, detailed velvet and satin textures, and an atmospheric urban gothic fashion editorial mood.

entries.title: Supreme Section 9 Cyberpunk Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a gritty cyberpunk streetwear editorial fashion photograph at night, styled as a conceptual collaboration between Supreme and Ghost in the Shell Section 9. Show one androgynous model crouching low in a wet industrial alley or underpass, one arm stretched up and braced against a rusted metal post on the left, the other hand resting near the hip. The model has long dark hair parted in the center, an intentionally anonymized or softly blurred face, and pointed cybernetic-looking ears. Outfit: black high-neck long-sleeve top with a centered red rectangular Supreme box logo on the chest, oversized black cargo pants, black shoes, fingerless black gloves, a transparent smoky-gray rain jacket, and a clear tactical utility belt with two visible hard-plastic pouches plus a dangling ID badge. Add a black shoulder tote bag on the model's right side printed with white futuristic graphics and the visible text SECTION 9, smaller Japanese-style technical text, circular cybernetic schematics, interface bars, and tiny icon marks. Environment: dark damp concrete, puddles reflecting cold light, peeling pipes and railings on the right, rust-stained column on the left, high-contrast flash photography, teal-gray shadows, raw urban texture, rain-slick reflections, underground security-zone atmosphere. Composition: square image, medium-full body from slightly above eye level, model centered but leaning diagonally, left arm forming a strong line to the upper-left corner, bag and chest logo clearly readable, fashion campaign realism rather than illustration. Lighting and style: harsh on-camera flash mixed with moody ambient darkness, desaturated black and green-gray palette with the red logo as the only strong color accent, film grain, documentary street style, premium editorial look, cybernetic tactical details, no extra people, no captions or borders.

entries.title: Impossible Wooden Chicago Knot City
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a macro-lens photograph of an impossible tabletop sculpture: a closed, continuous, self-intersecting topological knot manifold physically constructed from pale, smooth architectural modeling wood. Uniformly map the urban center of Chicago across the entire surface of the knot, extruding recognizable skyline towers, dense city blocks, gridded streets, bridges, rail lines, highways, and infrastructure directly from the wooden surface. Make the geometry paradoxical with no true up direction: buildings grow outward, inward into the hollow loops, sideways along the bands, and upside down beneath arches; roads and rail corridors wrap around the manifold and loop back into themselves infinitely. Emphasize Chicago-like landmarks including tall dark wooden skyscraper masses resembling Willis Tower and John Hancock Center with antenna spires, clustered downtown high-rises, river-bridge trusses, and elevated transit-like tracks integrated into the knot. The sculpture should form several interlocking torus-like loops with open hollow gaps, complex internal shadows, and dense miniature architectural detail on every visible surface. Use pristine gallery illumination with sharp intersecting shadows, a neutral gray gallery background, and a clean white square pedestal base to make the scale undeniably that of a handcrafted tabletop architectural model. Materials should be monochrome pale basswood or birch with fine laser-cut texture, tiny window grids, delicate etched roads, and layered wooden strips, photographed from a three-quarter front view with shallow macro depth of field, high realism, crisp detail, and no people.
entries.description: Generates a realistic macro photo of a pale wooden tabletop sculpture where Chicago is mapped across a self-intersecting impossible knot.
