entries.title: Cyberpunk Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-fashion cyberpunk magazine cover featuring a close-up street-style portrait of a young woman at night in a neon-lit capital city. She has long, thick cybernetic braids made of glossy black fiber-optic cables with blue, violet, and magenta highlights, metallic connector rings, and a circular tech ornament near one ear. Her face is intentionally covered by a square pixelated privacy block in muted brown-purple tones. She wears a black ribbed strappy top, a loose off-shoulder black leather jacket, and a wide futuristic chrome neck collar with panel details. In one hand she holds a small transparent cyberdeck or smartphone-like device with glowing blue interface graphics and attached cables running down into her outfit. The setting is a rainy urban night street with wet reflective pavement, blurred pedestrians, tall buildings, and colorful out-of-focus billboards and signs, photographed with shallow depth of field, cinematic bokeh, glossy reflections, and realistic editorial lighting. Design it as a fashion magazine cover with exactly 3 text elements: a huge thin white masthead at the top left reading NEURO, a small two-line caption at the top right reading FASHION SNAP\nCAPITAL CITY NIGHT, and a tiny issue/date mark at the bottom left reading 2126 / SPRING. Use a vertical cover composition, premium cyber-fashion aesthetic, photorealistic detail, cool blue-purple neon palette, and crisp typography.

entries.title: Balenciaga Street Fashion Sketch
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a loose, hand-drawn fashion street sketch in a naive black-ink marker style on a white background, showing exactly 2 tall slim young women standing on a rainy neon city sidewalk outside a BALENCIAGA storefront. Put the large handwritten word BALENCIAGA across the upper left. The left woman has a simple visible face, bright yellow-blonde chin-length hair with bangs, a relaxed tilted pose, very long thin legs, high-heeled open-toe sandals, and an oversized black hoodie or sweatshirt with the small white text BB BALENCIAGA on the chest above a short black skirt. The right woman is taller, with long black braided or dreadlocked hair and a deliberately blurred rectangular face, wearing an oversized black zip jacket, short black skirt, long thin legs, and high-heeled open-toe sandals, leaning casually with hands in pockets. Draw the clothes mostly as dense scribbled black fills with rough white highlights and wobbly outlines. The background should include exactly 5 visible vertical city signs on the left side: one tall white sign with yellow symbols and a red block, one narrow black sign with yellow characters, one white sign with red Japanese katakana reading カラオケ, one tiny traffic-light-like sign with red/yellow/green marks, and one small blue sign near the street; add another small blue-and-white sign on the far right edge. Show wet pavement with reflected red, yellow, blue, and gray squiggles, tiny distant pedestrians, simple perspective lines of buildings, and a minimal storefront wall on the right. Keep the composition sketchy, high-fashion, candid, imperfect, with thin black lines, sparse color accents, and lots of white space.

entries.title: Modern Sukeban Street Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body fashion-editorial street portrait of a modern-day Japanese delinquent schoolgirl vigilante standing wide-legged in the middle of a busy Tokyo entertainment district intersection, photographed from a slightly low angle for a bold heroic presence. She is a young Japanese woman with dark brown hair tied in a high ponytail with loose strands, wearing a white sailor-style school blouse with a navy collar and a large deep red bow, a short dark navy pleated skirt, an oversized black leather biker jacket, white crew socks, and chunky white sneakers with bright red laces. In one hand she loosely holds a metallic yo-yo hanging by its string as a signature weapon, while her other hand rests in her jacket pocket. The pose is confident, rebellious, and confrontational, like a contemporary reinterpretation of Sukeban Deka. Set the scene on a real urban Tokyo street with zebra crossing lines under her feet, cars stopped behind her, pedestrians along the sidewalks, and tall buildings packed with vertical Japanese shop signs and billboards fading into the background. Use shallow depth of field so the city remains recognizable but softly blurred, while the subject is crisp and centered. Lighting is bright natural daytime with soft contrast, realistic skin tones, premium fashion photography sharpness, and a cinematic urban cool-girl mood. Emphasize realism, high detail in the leather texture and pleated skirt, subtle wind in the ponytail, and a polished contemporary Japanese street-style aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic full-body urban fashion portrait of a modern Sukeban-style schoolgirl standing defiantly in a Tokyo street, ideal for cinematic character and street-style concept art.

entries.searchText: modern sukeban street portrait this prompt generates a realistic full-body urban fashion portrait of a modern sukeban-style schoolgirl standing defiantly in a tokyo street, ideal for cinematic character and street-style concept art. a full-body fashion-editorial street portrait of a modern-day japanese delinquent schoolgirl vigilante standing wide-legged in the middle of a busy tokyo entertainment district intersection, photographed from a slightly low angle for a bold heroic presence. she is a young japanese woman with dark brown hair tied in a high ponytail with loose strands, wearing a white sailor-style school blouse with a navy collar and a large deep red bow, a short dark navy pleated skirt, an oversized black leather biker jacket, white crew socks, and chunky white sneakers with bright red laces. in one hand she loosely holds a metallic yo-yo hanging by its string as a signature weapon, while her other hand rests in her jacket pocket. the pose is confident, rebellious, and confrontational, like a contemporary reinterpretation of sukeban deka. set the scene on a real urban tokyo street with zebra crossing lines under her feet, cars stopped behind her, pedestrians along the sidewalks, and tall buildings packed with vertical japanese shop signs and billboards fading into the background. use shallow depth of field so the city remains recognizable but softly blurred, while the subject is crisp and centered. lighting is bright natural daytime with soft contrast, realistic skin tones, premium fashion photography sharpness, and a cinematic urban cool-girl mood. emphasize realism, high detail in the leather texture and pleated skirt, subtle wind in the ponytail, and a polished contemporary japanese street-style aesthetic. product marketing portrait street cinematic fashion realistic editorial street city

entries.title: Luxury Miniature Dubai City Model
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-detailed cinematic isometric miniature city model of Burj Khalifa rising dramatically from the center of a square architectural master-plan board, presented like a luxury urban planning maquette on a black background. The composition shows one dominant ultra-tall silver skyscraper in the exact center, surrounded by a dense ring of modern high-rise towers, illuminated roads, bridges, and glowing warm city lights. Curving turquoise-blue water features and artificial lakes wrap around the central district in multiple connected pools and canals, with one large circular fountain-like feature near the tower base and several small island shapes visible in the water. In the lower right quadrant, include a large low-rise complex with rounded geometric roofs and subtle green-lit sections, connected by multilane roads and looping interchanges. The entire city sits on one square beige map board engraved with faint street grids and planning lines, with the board edges clearly visible and slightly raised. Viewpoint is a high three-quarter isometric angle, centered and symmetrical, with the tower extending far upward into negative space. Lighting is dramatic and luxurious: warm golden edge lights on buildings and roads, cool reflections in the water, crisp metallic highlights on the central tower, and a deep black void surrounding the model. Style should feel like a photorealistic architectural visualization mixed with a premium collectible scale model, extremely intricate, sharp, polished, and elegant.
entries.description: This prompt generates a photorealistic isometric architectural maquette of a landmark-centered modern city, ideal for concept art, real estate visualization, or premium urban design imagery.

entries.title: Urban Japanese Streetwear Lookbook Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A moody urban fashion editorial photo of a young woman crouching in a narrow alley beside a worn concrete wall covered with black graffiti and stickers, with a metal shutter in the background also marked with graffiti. She wears a loose navy blue tracksuit with white side stripes, consisting of 2 visible outfit pieces: a zip-front track jacket and matching track pants, layered over a light gray or off-white hooded sweatshirt, and white chunky sneakers. Her hair is tied up in a messy bun, and she poses with one elbow on her knee and one hand near her face, giving a casual, introspective street-style look. The face area is obscured by a rectangular blur block. The composition is vertical, full-body to three-quarter body, slightly low angle, with soft natural overcast lighting, muted cinematic colors, shallow depth of field, realistic photography, high detail in fabric folds, pavement texture, and wall grime. Add 2 distinct text overlays integrated into the image: on the left upper side, handwritten white Japanese brush-style text reading きゅっくらい、ちゃんと わたしを ほめてあげよ。; on the lower left, small elegant serif editorial text in white arranged in stacked lines reading exactly 5 lines: Street is
My Everyday.
2024
Autumn / Winter
Look Book, plus a small sixth credit line below reading by mellovneon. Emphasize a Japanese streetwear lookbook aesthetic, candid yet styled, slightly gritty, premium fashion campaign feel.
entries.description: This prompt generates a gritty editorial street-fashion portrait with handwritten Japanese text overlays, ideal for lookbooks, brand campaigns, and social media fashion visuals.

entries.title: Elegant City Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-fashion magazine cover photo in a polished editorial style, vertical portrait orientation, showing a beautiful young adult woman walking confidently toward the camera in the middle of a modern financial district at sunset. She is centered full-body, photographed at street level with cinematic depth of field, framed by tall glass office towers on both sides reflecting warm golden evening light. The mood is elegant, urban, powerful, and refined, like an upscale fashion magazine cover about after-work style. The woman has long dark hair styled in a thick side braid over one shoulder, a slim sophisticated silhouette, and a poised runway-like stride. She wears a fitted ribbed turtleneck sweater in burnt orange with decorative gold buttons on one shoulder, a high-waisted pencil skirt in warm brown, a black belt with a gold buckle, and carries a structured black handbag in one hand. Her expression should feel calm, self-assured, and graceful. Use flattering soft golden-hour lighting, realistic skin and fabric textures, crisp fashion-photography detail on the outfit, and slightly blurred businesspeople in the background walking through the plaza to suggest a busy city evening. The background should include exactly 4 distant office workers, softly out of focus, spread across the walkway. Add realistic magazine cover typography integrated over the image: a very large elegant serif masthead on the upper left reading CITY POISE; beneath it on the left, the cover lines "AFTER-WORK STYLE THAT COMMANDS THE EVENING", "MODERN ELEGANCE", "Polished looks for the office and beyond.", "WORK. WALK. WIND DOWN.", "Versatile pieces that move with your day.", "THE POWER OF NEUTRALS", and "Warm tones, clean lines, Quiet confidence."; on the upper right, small text "STYLE & CULTURE" and "MAY 2024"; below that on the right, the teaser "Sunset meetings and city lights. Your best look starts here."; in the lower right, the cover line "EVENING ELEVATED" with the smaller text "From desk to dinner plans- effortless style that transitions beautifully."; and a realistic barcode box at the bottom right with "MAY 2024", US and CAN prices, small issue numbers, and barcode lines. Make the overall composition clean, premium, balanced, and convincingly like a real contemporary fashion magazine cover.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic luxury fashion magazine cover featuring a stylish woman walking through a sunset-lit business district, ideal for editorial, branding, and cover design concepts.

entries.title: Anime Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stylized Japanese fashion magazine cover titled MODE TOKYO, designed like a glossy contemporary women's style publication. The composition is a high-angle, dynamic street-fashion anime illustration of 2 girls looking up toward the viewer from beside a brick wall with colorful graffiti and dramatic sunlight. The girl on the right has golden blonde hair in a lively messy ponytail with loose bangs, bright green eyes, a wide cheerful grin, and a sporty-feminine outfit: a light blue lace-trim camisole or slip-style top, short bottoms, chunky white sneakers, and a black choker. She is posed energetically, leaning forward with one knee bent, giving a confident summer-fashion editorial feel. The girl on the left has long vivid teal-green hair with straight heavy bangs, large blue eyes, and a calm, cool expression. She wears a casual layered street outfit in dark tones with a sleeveless top and sits lower in the frame, angled toward the right girl while gazing upward. Use bold cel-shaded anime rendering with crisp linework, glossy highlights in the hair and eyes, soft skin shading, and a polished commercial illustration finish. The background should combine sunlit urban texture, blurred mural colors in pink, purple, orange, and black, and deep shadows to create contrast. The overall palette mixes hot pink typography, summer sunlight, teal, blonde, and saturated street-art hues. Include dense magazine-cover typography in a premium editorial layout: a giant pink serif masthead reading MODE across the top with TOKYO vertically on the left; on the upper right a dark circular or rounded block containing 06, JUNE 2024, vol.218, and cover lines in Japanese; on the left side several smaller Japanese and English fashion blurbs including NEO BASIC STYLE and SPORTY × FEMININE; a pink circular badge on the right with Japanese text and Trend 7; a large hot-pink Japanese headline across the lower left and center reading 私らしく、もっと輝く季節。; elegant white handwritten script diagonally across the lower right reading Shine in my Style; small footer cover lines and hashtags in Japanese; and a small BEAUTY label at bottom right. Make it look exactly like a real high-end Japanese fashion magazine cover, vertical format, full bleed, vibrant, youthful, feminine, sporty, and trendy.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style Japanese fashion magazine cover with two stylish girls, dense editorial typography, and a vibrant sporty-feminine streetwear aesthetic.

entries.title: WSJ-Style Business Newspaper Front Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic overhead three-quarter view of a folded financial newspaper on a dark wooden desk, styled like a prestigious American business daily from the 1980s-2000s, with crisp realistic newsprint texture, subtle paper wrinkles, slightly worn folded edges, and warm morning sunlight casting diagonal window-shadow bands across the page. The masthead dominates the top in large classic serif capitals reading THE WALL STREET DAILY.. Directly beneath it is a thin header strip with small financial-paper details: "DOW JONES", "News Corp", the date line "MONDAY, APRIL 20, 2026 - VOL. CCLXXXV NO. 90", "WSJ.com", a star rating row, and the price "$5.00". The main lead story spans the upper center-left with a huge bold serif headline reading Cook to Step Down as Apple CEO; Ternus Named Successor. Below it is a smaller serif subheadline: "Transition caps 15-year run; company pivots to AI-driven future". Add a byline line in small caps with 2 reporters: "By Tim Higgins" and "And Joanna Stern". Fill the lead article with dense, fully legible multi-column newspaper body text about Tim Cook stepping down as Apple chief executive, John Ternus succeeding him, Apple's growth, AI strategy, and corporate transition; the text should read like authentic financial journalism, not placeholder gibberish. On the right half of the lead story, place a black-and-white engraved stipple portrait of a male executive in collared shirt and jacket, centered in a rectangular image area; the face is partially obscured by a pale gray square censor block over the eyes and upper nose, creating a modern satirical effect. At the top-right, include a sidebar box titled "What's New" with exactly 2 subsection headers, "Business & Finance" and "World-Wide", each followed by bullet-point briefs in small serif text; include exactly 3 bullets under "Business & Finance" and exactly 4 bullets under "World-Wide", all fully typeset and legible. Beneath the main story, add a secondary banner article across the page titled "Silicon Valley Braces for New Chapter in AI Arms Race" with a byline "By Liz Hoffman" and several short columns of text about big tech, startups, OpenAI, Google, Meta, chips, platforms, and AI competition. To the right of this lower-middle section, insert a compact markets table titled "Markets" with exactly 4 rows labeled "DOW JONES", "S&P 500", "NASDAQ", and "10-YR. TREASURY", with columns for index/value/change/percent and realistic numeric values in tight newspaper tabular formatting. Along the bottom strip of the front page, include exactly 3 teaser boxes: left box with section label "Heard on the Street" and headline "Why Investors Are Rethinking Big Tech" plus page marker "B12"; center box with section label "Markets" and headline "Earnings Season Lifts Stocks Despite Rate Uncertainty" plus page marker "B1"; right box with section label "Inside" and headline "Private Credit Sees Inflow Surge as Yields Stay High" plus page marker "B14". Make all typography clean, sharp, perfectly legible, and consistently aligned in authentic newspaper grid layout with thin rules between columns, justified text, classic serif fonts, and realistic print contrast. The newspaper sits slightly rotated clockwise on the desk. In the environment, show a white ceramic coffee cup filled with black coffee in the top-right corner and a pair of dark-framed eyeglasses resting near the lower-right edge of the paper. In the top-left corner, include the cropped edge of a dark cylindrical object, likely a camera lens or tumbler. Overall mood: premium editorial mock front page, serious business-news aesthetic, believable print photography, ultra-detailed, natural shadows, high resolution.

entries.title: Traveling Alchemist in Rainy Fantasy Alley
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical fantasy anime illustration of Kanon, a traveling young alchemist walking toward the viewer through a narrow medieval stone alley at dusk after rain. She has blonde hair in two long braids, wears a dark navy cap with large blue headphones over it, a loose off-white tunic shirt, baggy dark trousers, rugged brown lace-up boots, and a flowing deep blue traveler's cloak fastened at the neck. Her face is hidden by a flat opaque square censor block in a muted brown tone. In her left hand she carries a warm glowing brass lantern, and across her body is a leather satchel containing exactly two visible potion vials, one blue and one green. Beside her floats exactly one small round companion robot, white and gray with a glossy black face panel and two cyan glowing eyes. The setting is an old European fantasy town with rough stone walls, timber roofs, distant towers, wet cobblestones, puddle reflections, misty blue evening atmosphere, and several warm wall lanterns receding into the background. Use cinematic lighting with strong contrast between cool blue twilight and golden lantern glow, painterly detailed brushwork, soft depth of field, moody adventurous atmosphere, full-body composition, centered character, no text.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a low-resolution, early-2000s 3D video game screenshot in a gritty PlayStation 2 / GTA-style aesthetic, showing a close-up view of a bald male driver seated inside a car at night. The camera is positioned just outside the front-left area of the vehicle, looking through the open side window toward the driver. The driver wears a black jacket and has one visible hand gripping or resting on the steering wheel in the foreground. His head and ear are visible, but the entire face is intentionally covered by a large opaque medium brown rectangular privacy block centered over the face, extending from forehead to chin. The car interior is dark gray and black with a chunky low-poly steering wheel, seat, headrest, door frame, and dashboard shapes. Outside the window, show a dimly lit urban street or parking area with muted trees, pavement, and vertical poles, rendered with blocky textures and heavy pixelation. entries.title: Miniature Japanese Canal Town at Dusk
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic isometric street-level view of a dense nostalgic Japanese canal-side neighborhood at blue hour, designed like a miniature lived-in urban diorama. The scene is packed with tightly clustered multi-story buildings of varied shapes and ages, with weathered concrete, faded painted walls, patched metal roofs, tiled roofs, small balconies, rooftop tanks, antennas, pipes, exposed wiring, hanging laundry, window air conditioners, satellite dishes, potted plants, vines, and warm glowing interior lights in nearly every window. At the center, place a charming teal-blue shop house with a dark blue tiled roof, rounded windows, exterior stairs, a tiny awning, and a bright retro sign reading トリナオ. Surround it with many neighboring storefronts and residences stacked irregularly at different heights, creating a layered maze of alleys, staircases, landings, bridges, and utility poles. Include exactly 2 vending machines near the lower center-right area, exactly 2 bicycles along the canal-side walkway, exactly 1 satellite dish on an upper roof near the center, exactly 1 large round wall clock mounted on a cylindrical corner building on the right, and exactly 1 canal in the foreground with dark reflective water and a curved concrete embankment. Add numerous vertical Japanese shop signs and lit billboards throughout the composition, including signs resembling 久保田, 山城商店, and other retro neighborhood business signage. The architecture should feel hand-crafted, eclectic, slightly whimsical, and deeply lived in, with dense environmental storytelling and no empty space. Lighting is soft dusk light mixed with warm amber practical lights from windows, lanterns, and signs, creating a cozy yet bustling mood. Color palette: teal, muted red, worn cream, mossy green, rust, indigo, and warm tungsten yellow. Style: hyper-detailed photoreal miniature cityscape, cinematic depth, crisp textures, subtle atmospheric haze, high dynamic range, Japanese Showa-era inspired urban nostalgia, richly layered composition, no visible people, wide landscape framing.

entries.title: Night Train Racing HUD Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A cinematic night action scene inspired by arcade street-racing game HUD design, showing 2 Japanese commuter trains racing side by side on elevated urban tracks through a dense city at night. The viewpoint is low and slightly ahead of the trains, angled three-quarters toward their front-left sides, with dramatic motion blur streaking the rails, buildings, and overhead wires to emphasize extreme speed. The left train is a modern bright red commuter train with a cream front panel, route display reading 品川, and the number 2100 on the front. The right train is a deep maroon classic-style commuter train with warm interior lighting, twin headlights, the number 2000 on the front, and a circular headmark reading 競技 with smaller text 久里浜→品川. The maroon train is slightly ahead. The setting is a dark metropolitan skyline with illuminated office windows, railway catenary structures, and a distant Tokyo Tower visible on the right side of the horizon. Use a moody, high-contrast palette of black, charcoal, deep reds, amber window light, and metallic reflections, with a glossy, realistic photographic look.

Overlay a sleek white racing-game interface directly on the image. Include exactly 5 UI components: 1) top-left circular mini-map with a location pin icon, a simple route line, and the text 5.4 km; below it, two lines of Japanese text reading 京急本線 下り and 京急久里浜→品川. 2) top-right speed display showing large numerals 168, smaller km/h, a thin horizontal divider, and below that 4 段. 3) bottom-left vertical control meter labeled BC at the top, with markings 12 through 1 descending, letters B, N, and P on the left side, and a small green indicator near 7. 4) bottom-center horizontal bar meter labeled ブレーキ on the left and パワー on the right, with a blue-to-magenta-to-red gradient fill and a 0 to 200 km/h scale beneath. 5) bottom-right circular pressure-style gauge labeled kPa with markings 0, 200, 400, 800, 1000 and small labels MR and BC beneath, plus a matching vertical numeric scale beside it. Keep the HUD minimal, thin-lined, elegant, and semi-transparent, integrated like a futuristic train racing dashboard. Ultra-detailed, dynamic, realistic, dramatic long-exposure energy, no people in foreground, no extra panels or split layout.

entries.title: Ink 360 Panorama of Tokyo Backstreet
entries.author: YouMind

entries.title: Civ-Style Tokyo Island Megacity Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A highly detailed isometric grand-strategy video game screenshot in the style of a modern Civilization VII city view, showing a dense futuristic coastal island metropolis inspired by Tokyo in 2020 CE. The camera looks down from a high oblique angle over a compact urban island surrounded by vivid turquoise-blue ocean with sun-glitter reflections. The city is extremely dense, packed wall-to-wall with hundreds of modern high-rise towers, apartment blocks, office buildings, neon billboards, multilane roads, rail lines, bridges, and waterfront piers. In the center are 3 standout landmark structures: a red lattice communications tower resembling Tokyo Tower, a large traditional Japanese temple complex with green roofs, and a 5-tier pagoda. Near the left shoreline stands 1 monumental statue on a rocky promontory resembling a giant seated or standing Buddha. Near the upper center sits 1 circular stadium or domed arena embedded among skyscrapers. The harbor contains exactly 10 visible boats and ships of mixed sizes, including ferries, yachts, and small passenger vessels, plus crowded marina docks along the right and lower shorelines. Blend traditional Japanese architecture with hyper-dense contemporary urbanism, cherry blossom trees scattered through streets and parks, intricate road loops, tiny vehicles, and layered waterfront infrastructure. The island shoreline should feel irregular, rocky, and heavily developed, with the sea transitioning from deep sapphire to clear tropical cyan near the coast.

Render it as a polished strategy-game UI screenshot rather than a pure illustration. Add a full game HUD overlay with ornate bronze-and-navy fantasy-tech interface styling. Along the top bar, show multiple resource counters and turn information; include the text Turn: 103 | 2020 CE and a time display. On the upper right, show 7 hanging civilization banners with leader portraits or emblems. On the left side, show a quest/journal panel titled Journal containing 3 task sections: "The Cross and the Crescent", "Legacy Path: Silk Roads", and "Buildings: Wonders", each with short objective lines beneath. In the lower left, include 1 minimap framed in ornate UI. In the lower right, include 1 large circular city-management dial and a prominent button labeled GROW TOWN, plus 3 smaller circular action buttons nearby. The overall image should feel like an authentic in-game screenshot: razor-sharp, information-rich, colorful, immersive, and believable, with realistic urban density, accurate transportation details, and a luxurious next-generation 4X strategy aesthetic.

entries.title: Civilization-Style Tokyo Bay Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A highly detailed grand-strategy game screenshot in the visual style of a modern Civilization-like city view, showing an isometric aerial perspective of a dense coastal Japanese metropolis built on a compact island surrounded by deep blue ocean. The city should feel like late-20th-century Tokyo Bay, with a believable mix of real-world-inspired landmarks and stylized strategy-game worldbuilding. In the center, place a red-orange steel broadcast tower resembling Tokyo Tower, surrounded by several traditional temple and pagoda complexes with green-tiled roofs, embedded seamlessly inside a forest of tightly packed mid-rise and high-rise concrete and glass buildings. Include exactly 1 red lattice tower, exactly 3 prominent traditional temple or shrine complexes, exactly 2 multi-tier pagodas, exactly 1 large waterside stadium near the upper center shoreline, and exactly 1 monumental statue on a headland at the left edge of the island. The urban fabric should be extremely dense, with narrow streets, elevated roads, billboards, rooftop details, cherry blossom trees scattered through districts, commercial signage, docks, piers, warehouses, and mixed residential and office blocks. The shoreline must be irregular and heavily developed with harbors and ferry terminals, and the surrounding water should contain exactly 12 visible vessels of mixed types: ferries, small motorboats, workboats, yachts, and 1 tall-masted sailing ship near the lower right. Render the water in rich teal-to-navy gradients with shallow coastal transparency and detailed wakes.

Present it explicitly as a video game interface screenshot. Add a thin top status bar with resource counters and turn information; the upper right should read Turn: 103, 1992 CE, 2:51 PM. Place exactly 7 leader banners across the upper right, each with a different color and emblem, and include a diplomacy panel naming Tokugawa Ieyasu of the Japanese Empire. On the left side, add a vertical journal panel titled Journal with 3 quest entries and small circular icons. In the lower left, include exactly 1 minimap framed in ornate UI styling. In the lower right, include a large circular command interface with metallic bronze-and-gold ornamentation and a button labeled GROW TOWN; around it place exactly 3 smaller circular action buttons. The overall interface should feel premium, intricate, and historically flavored rather than futuristic.

The city itself should evoke Tokyo, Japan in 1992 CE, recreated as a lush, polished, slightly idealized 4X strategy game screenshot with cinematic lighting, crisp miniature-like detail, realistic urban density, authentic Japanese transportation and waterfront infrastructure, and a color palette of ocean blue, concrete gray, greenery, copper UI metals, and pops of neon signage. Use a high-angle three-quarter camera, sharp focus across the whole city, and richly textured, painterly-realistic rendering consistent with gpt-image-2 game concept screenshot output.

entries.title: Civ-Style 1954 Tokyo Harbor Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A high-detail grand strategy game screenshot in the style of a modern Civilization VII interface, showing an isometric aerial view of a dense coastal island metropolis inspired by Tokyo, Japan in 1954 CE. The city fills a compact island and several connected reclaimed islets in a bright blue harbor, with intricate urban density, narrow streets, mid-century low- and mid-rise concrete buildings, docks, ferries, cargo boats, patrol vessels, and small ships scattered across the water. At the visual center, include a cluster of iconic Japanese landmarks: a red-and-white lattice broadcast tower resembling Tokyo Tower, a large traditional temple complex with green roofs, and a multi-tier pagoda, surrounded by tightly packed neighborhoods. Add a large waterfront statue on the left side of the island, industrial smoke stacks near the shoreline, bridges, piers, seawalls, and layered districts climbing gentle hills. The architecture should mix postwar urban Japan with traditional shrines and temples, conveying a believable historical city simulation with accurate transportation details and harbor infrastructure. Use crisp strategy-game rendering, cinematic sunlight, realistic water reflections, tiny moving vehicles and ships, and rich texture detail across roads, rooftops, trees, and coastlines.

Overlay a complete 4X strategy game UI: a dark top bar with resource counters on the left, exactly 7 circular action or technology icons near the upper left, turn and date text at the top right reading Turn: 103 | 1954 CE, and a small time readout. On the left side, add a journal panel titled Journal with 3 visible quest sections: "The Cross and the Crescent", "Legacy Path: Silk Roads", and "Buildings: Wonders", each with short objective lines beneath. Across the upper center-right, place exactly 7 vertical civilization banners with portrait medallions. On the upper right, include a leader info card for "Tokugawa Ieyasu" and "Japanese Empire" with small stat values. On the bottom left, include a minimap framed in bronze showing a colorful world map. On the bottom right, add a large ornate circular command dial with smaller adjacent buttons and a prominent button labeled "GROW TOWN". The whole image should look like an authentic in-game screenshot rather than concept art, with polished UI, readable but small text, and the composition focused on the spectacular cityscape and harbor.

entries.title: Civilization-Style Japanese Island City
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed isometric grand-strategy game screenshot in the style of a modern historical 4X interface, showing a dense island port city of the Japanese Empire during the 1260 CE. The city fills almost the entire island and is surrounded by vivid turquoise coastal water and darker deep-blue sea. The urban layout is extremely dense and organic, with hundreds of tightly packed low wooden buildings, narrow winding streets, many docks and piers, and bustling harbor infrastructure wrapping around the shoreline. At the center of the island are 4 prominent landmark structures: 3 large traditional East Asian temple or palace buildings with layered green-blue tiled roofs arranged around a broad plaza, and 1 tall red pagoda slightly to the right of center. Include many smaller shrines, courtyards, stone paths, patches of trees, and scattered pale pink cherry blossoms among the rooftops. The island terrain should have slight elevation changes, rocky edges, and several harbor inlets, with bridges and wooden waterfront platforms connecting different neighborhoods. Populate the surrounding waters with exactly 16 visible vessels of mixed sizes: large sailing ships, medium trade ships, and small boats, some docked and some anchored offshore. Show light smoke rising from several points in the city and harbor, suggesting industry and daily activity. The overall lighting is bright afternoon sunlight with crisp shadows and richly saturated colors, emphasizing clear water, weathered wood, ceramic roof tiles, and coastal stone. The camera angle is high, wide, and slightly tilted, like a premium strategy game city overview. Add a full game UI overlay closely resembling a polished civilization-building game: a dark ornate top bar with many resource counters on the left, the text Turn: 103 | 1260 CE and 2:51 PM on the right, a vertical quest panel on the upper left titled Journal with multiple objective lines beneath it, a row of 6 hanging banner icons for rival factions across the upper right-center, a leader portrait panel in the top right for Tokugawa Ieyasu labeled Japanese Empire, a rectangular minimap in the bottom left, and a large circular bronze-and-gold city management button in the bottom right labeled GROW TOWN, with 3 smaller circular action buttons stacked beside it. The image should feel like an authentic gameplay screenshot from a fictional Civilization VII-like game, ultra-detailed, historically grounded, cinematic, and believable.

entries.title: Elf Girl Walking Goat and Robot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic anime-realistic background scene on a quiet Japanese suburban residential street in Chofu City, near Jindaiji-dori on a bright summer afternoon. A small elf girl with pale blue bob-cut hair, pointed ears, and a calm profile expression walks from right to left across the foreground, wearing a loose white short-sleeved knee-length dress, white socks, and brown lace-up ankle boots. She holds a rope leash attached to a white goat walking beside her; the goat has short curved horns, shaggy fur, and follows obediently in side view. Behind the goat trails a compact dark steampunk robot companion, squat and armored, made of blackened metal plates, exposed gears, pipes, bolts, red lens eyes, and little horn-like antennae, walking like a loyal mechanical pet. The street slopes gently downhill into the distance, lined with concrete block walls, hedges, small two-story houses with tiled roofs, utility poles, overhead power lines, a curved streetlamp, guardrails, drainage grates, and leafy trees casting dappled shadows on the asphalt. The background should feel like a plausible real Japanese neighborhood, with detailed perspective, distant houses and greenery, blue sky, scattered white clouds, warm sunlight, soft atmospheric haze, and highly detailed painterly rendering. entries.title: Rainy Tokyo Ramen Alley
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic night street scene in Tokyo, showing a narrow rainy alley lined with ramen shops and dense vertical neon signs. The camera is at street level with a wide-angle documentary feel, looking down the wet pavement where blue, red, and white neon reflections stretch across puddles. In the right foreground, an open-air ramen counter glows with warm amber light and heavy steam; a chef in a dark work shirt with tattooed forearms lifts noodles from a boiling pot with chopsticks, his face obscured by a soft rectangular anonymizing blur. Hang exactly two prominent red paper lanterns over the stall, both with bold black Japanese text ラーメン. Add stainless pots, stacked bowls, chopsticks, condiment bottles, hanging lamps, dark noren curtains, and a tall black wooden signboard with large gold Japanese calligraphy beside the counter. The background alley should contain distant silhouettes of pedestrians, countless small illuminated storefront signs, rain streaks, mist, and atmospheric steam drifting through the scene. Style: photorealistic but clearly AI-generated, high dynamic range, moody cyberpunk-noir color palette, wet asphalt, volumetric lighting, sharp foreground detail, deep perspective, 16:9 composition, dramatic contrast, shot as if with a 24mm lens at night after rainfall.
